## read_file result
     1|import Algorithms.SGD
     2|import Lib.Glue.Probability
     3|
     4|open MeasureTheory ProbabilityTheory
     5|open scoped InnerProductSpace
     6|
     7|variable {E : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
     8|  [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E] [SecondCountableTopology E]
     9|variable {S : Type*} [MeasurableSpace S]
    10|variable {Ω : Type*} [MeasurableSpace Ω]
    11|
    12|/-- SVRG setup for inner-loop analysis: stochastic infrastructure is inherited from `SGDSetup`.
    13|
    14|The snapshot `wTilde` and its precomputed full gradient are theorem parameters, not structure
    15|fields, because they vary across outer epochs. -/
    16|structure SVRGSetup
    17|    (E : Type*) [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
    18|      [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E]
    19|    (S : Type*) [MeasurableSpace S]
    20|    (Ω : Type*) [MeasurableSpace Ω] where
    21|  toSGDSetup : SGDSetup E S Ω
    22|
    23|namespace SVRGSetup
    24|
    25|variable (setup : SVRGSetup E S Ω)
    26|
    27|/-- Sample distribution inherited from the base setup. -/
    28|noncomputable def sampleDist : Measure S :=
    29|  setup.toSGDSetup.sampleDist
    30|
    31|/-- SVRG variance-reduced oracle with fixed snapshot and precomputed full gradient term.
    32|
    33|`svrgOracle wTilde gradLTilde w s = gradL(w,s) - gradL(wTilde,s) + gradLTilde`. -/
    34|def svrgOracle (wTilde gradLTilde : E) (w : E) (s : S) : E :=
    35|  setup.toSGDSetup.gradL w s - setup.toSGDSetup.gradL wTilde s + gradLTilde
    36|
    37|/-- SVRG inner-loop process for fixed snapshot parameters. -/
    38|noncomputable def svrgProcess (wTilde gradLTilde : E) : ℕ → Ω → E :=
    39|  sgdProcess setup.toSGDSetup.w₀ setup.toSGDSetup.η
    40|    (setup.svrgOracle wTilde gradLTilde) setup.toSGDSetup.ξ
    41|
    42|omit [SecondCountableTopology E] in
    43|@[simp] theorem process_zero (wTilde gradLTilde : E) :
    44|    setup.svrgProcess wTilde gradLTilde 0 = fun _ => setup.toSGDSetup.w₀ := rfl
    45|
    46|omit [SecondCountableTopology E] in
    47|@[simp] theorem process_succ (wTilde gradLTilde : E) (t : ℕ) :
    48|    setup.svrgProcess wTilde gradLTilde (t + 1) = fun ω =>
    49|      setup.svrgProcess wTilde gradLTilde t ω
    50|        - (setup.toSGDSetup.η t) •
    51|          (setup.toSGDSetup.gradL (setup.svrgProcess wTilde gradLTilde t ω) (setup.toSGDSetup.ξ t ω)
    52|            - setup.toSGDSetup.gradL wTilde (setup.toSGDSetup.ξ t ω) + gradLTilde) := rfl
    53|
    54|/-- Measurability of the SVRG oracle from base joint measurability.
    55|
    56|Used in: `SVRG inner-loop strongly-convex convergence`
    57|(`Algorithms/SVRG.lean`, bridge construction — oracle measurability) -/
    58|theorem measurable_svrgOracle
    59|    (wTilde gradLTilde : E)
    60|    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSGDSetup.gradL)) :
    61|    Measurable (Function.uncurry (setup.svrgOracle wTilde gradLTilde)) := by
    62|  have h_wTilde : Measurable (fun p : E × S => setup.toSGDSetup.gradL wTilde p.2) := by
    63|    simpa [Function.uncurry] using
    64|      hgL.comp ((measurable_const : Measurable (fun _ : E × S => wTilde)).prodMk measurable_snd)
    65|  simpa [SVRGSetup.svrgOracle, Function.uncurry] using
    66|    (hgL.sub h_wTilde).add measurable_const
    67|
    68|/-- Measurability of each SVRG iterate.
    69|
    70|Used in: `SVRG inner-loop strongly-convex convergence`
    71|(`Algorithms/SVRG.lean`, bridge construction — iterate measurability) -/
    72|theorem svrgProcess_measurable
    73|    (wTilde gradLTilde : E)
    74|    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    75|    (t : ℕ) :
    76|    Measurable (setup.svrgProcess wTilde gradLTilde t) := by
    77|  simpa [SVRGSetup.svrgProcess] using
    78|    (sgdProcess_measurable
    79|      (hξ := setup.toSGDSetup.hξ_meas)
    80|      (hg := setup.measurable_svrgOracle wTilde gradLTilde hgL)
    81|      (t := t))
    82|
    83|/-- Adaptedness of SVRG process to `sgdFiltration`.
    84|
    85|Used in: `SVRG inner-loop strongly-convex convergence`
    86|(`Algorithms/SVRG.lean`, filtration argument reuse) -/
    87|theorem svrgProcess_adapted
    88|    (wTilde gradLTilde : E)
    89|    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSGDSetup.gradL)) :
    90|    Adapted (sgdFiltration setup.toSGDSetup.ξ setup.toSGDSetup.hξ_meas)
    91|      (fun t => setup.svrgProcess wTilde gradLTilde t) := by
    92|  simpa [SVRGSetup.svrgProcess] using
    93|    (sgdProcess_adapted
    94|      (hξ := setup.toSGDSetup.hξ_meas)
    95|      (hg := setup.measurable_svrgOracle wTilde gradLTilde hgL))
    96|
    97|/-- Independence of `svrgProcess t` and fresh sample `ξ t`.
    98|
    99|Used in: `SVRG inner-loop strongly-convex convergence`
   100|(`Algorithms/SVRG.lean`, bridge construction — independence field) -/
   101|lemma svrgProcess_indepFun_xi
   102|    (wTilde gradLTilde : E)
   103|    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
   104|    (t : ℕ) :
   105|    IndepFun (setup.svrgProcess wTilde gradLTilde t) (setup.toSGDSetup.ξ t) setup.toSGDSetup.P := by
   106|  simpa [SVRGSetup.svrgProcess] using
   107|    (sgdProcess_indepFun_xi
   108|      (hξ_meas := setup.toSGDSetup.hξ_meas)
   109|      (hξ_indep := setup.toSGDSetup.hξ_indep)
   110|      (hgL := setup.measurable_svrgOracle wTilde gradLTilde hgL)
   111|      (t := t))
   112|
   113|omit [SecondCountableTopology E] in
   114|/-- Unbiasedness of the SVRG oracle at fixed snapshot.
   115|
   116|This is the key integral identity:
   117|`∫(gradL w - gradL wTilde + gradLTilde) = gradF w`
   118|when `gradLTilde = gradF wTilde`.
   119|
   120|Used in: `SVRG inner-loop strongly-convex convergence`
   121|(`Algorithms/SVRG.lean`, bridge construction — unbiasedness) -/
   122|theorem unbiased_svrgOracle
   123|    (wTilde gradLTilde : E)
   124|    (hunb : IsUnbiased setup.toSGDSetup.gradL setup.toSGDSetup.gradF setup.sampleDist)
   125|    (h_sample_prob : IsProbabilityMeasure setup.sampleDist)
   126|    (h_intL : ∀ w, Integrable (setup.toSGDSetup.gradL w) setup.sampleDist)
   127|    (hgradLTilde : gradLTilde = setup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde) :
   128|    IsUnbiased (setup.svrgOracle wTilde gradLTilde) setup.toSGDSetup.gradF setup.sampleDist := by
   129|  intro w
   130|  letI : IsProbabilityMeasure setup.sampleDist := h_sample_prob
   131|  have h_sub_int : Integrable
   132|      (fun s => setup.toSGDSetup.gradL w s - setup.toSGDSetup.gradL wTilde s) setup.sampleDist :=
   133|    (h_intL w).sub (h_intL wTilde)
   134|  calc
   135|    ∫ s, setup.svrgOracle wTilde gradLTilde w s ∂setup.sampleDist
   136|        = ∫ s, (setup.toSGDSetup.gradL w s - setup.toSGDSetup.gradL wTilde s) ∂setup.sampleDist
   137|          + ∫ s, gradLTilde ∂setup.sampleDist := by
   138|            rw [show (fun s => setup.svrgOracle wTilde gradLTilde w s) =
   139|                (fun s => (setup.toSGDSetup.gradL w s - setup.toSGDSetup.gradL wTilde s) + gradLTilde)
   140|                from by
   141|                  ext s
   142|                  simp [SVRGSetup.svrgOracle]]
   143|            rw [integral_add h_sub_int (integrable_const _)]
   144|    _ = (∫ s, setup.toSGDSetup.gradL w s ∂setup.sampleDist)
   145|          - (∫ s, setup.toSGDSetup.gradL wTilde s ∂setup.sampleDist) + gradLTilde := by
   146|            simp [integral_sub (h_intL w) (h_intL wTilde), integral_const, probReal_univ]
   147|    _ = setup.toSGDSetup.gradF w - setup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde + gradLTilde := by
   148|          rw [hunb w, hunb wTilde]
   149|    _ = setup.toSGDSetup.gradF w := by
   150|          simpa [hgradLTilde] using
   151|            (sub_add_cancel (setup.toSGDSetup.gradF w) (setup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde))
   152|
   153|/-- Effective SGD setup corresponding to fixed-snapshot SVRG inner loop.
   154|
   155|Used in: `SVRG inner-loop strongly-convex convergence`
   156|(`Algorithms/SVRG.lean`, reduction to SGD strongly-convex theorem) -/
   157|noncomputable def effectiveSGDSetup (wTilde gradLTilde : E) : SGDSetup E S Ω where
   158|  w₀ := setup.toSGDSetup.w₀
   159|  η := setup.toSGDSetup.η
   160|  gradL := setup.svrgOracle wTilde gradLTilde
   161|  gradF := setup.toSGDSetup.gradF
   162|  ξ := setup.toSGDSetup.ξ
   163|  P := setup.toSGDSetup.P
   164|  hP := setup.toSGDSetup.hP
   165|  hξ_meas := setup.toSGDSetup.hξ_meas
   166|  hξ_indep := setup.toSGDSetup.hξ_indep
   167|  hξ_ident := setup.toSGDSetup.hξ_ident
   168|
   169|/-- Bridge fixed-snapshot SVRG state at step `t` to `StochasticDescentHyps`.
   170|
   171|Used in: `SVRG inner-loop strongly-convex convergence`
   172|(`Algorithms/SVRG.lean`, one-step Layer1 interface) -/
   173|noncomputable def svrg_to_hyps
   174|    (wTilde gradLTilde : E)
   175|    (t : ℕ)
   176|    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
   177|    (hgF_meas : Measurable setup.toSGDSetup.gradF)
   178|    (hunb_eff : IsUnbiased (setup.svrgOracle wTilde gradLTilde) setup.toSGDSetup.gradF setup.sampleDist) :
   179|    StochasticDescentHyps E S Ω :=
   180|  sgd_to_hyps (setup := setup.effectiveSGDSetup wTilde gradLTilde) t
   181|    (setup.measurable_svrgOracle wTilde gradLTilde hgL) hgF_meas hunb_eff
   182|
   183|-- Optional bridge: derive `HasBoundedVariance` from finite-sum SVRG assumptions.
   184|set_option maxHeartbeats 4000000 in
   185|theorem svrg_hvar_eff_from_finite
   186|    (setup : SVRGSetup E S Ω) (f : E → ℝ) {L : NNReal} {σeff : ℝ}
   187|    [Fintype S] [Nonempty S]
   188|    (wStar wTilde gradLTilde : E) (fStar : ℝ)
   189|    (hgradLTilde : gradLTilde = setup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde)
   190|    (h_unif_sample : ∀ g : S → ℝ, Integrable g setup.sampleDist →
   191|      ∫ s, g s ∂setup.sampleDist = (1 / (Fintype.card S : ℝ)) * ∑ s : S, g s)
   192|    (h_int_oracle_sample : ∀ w : E, Integrable
   193|      (fun s => ‖setup.toSGDSetup.gradL w s - setup.toSGDSetup.gradL wTilde s +
   194|        setup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde‖ ^ 2) setup.sampleDist)
   195|    (h_pointwise_oracle : ∀ s : S, ∀ w : E,
   196|      ‖setup.toSGDSetup.gradL w s - setup.toSGDSetup.gradL wTilde s + setup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde‖ ^ 2
   197|        ≤ 4 * (L : ℝ) * (f w - fStar) +
   198|          2 * ‖setup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde - setup.toSGDSetup.gradF wStar‖ ^ 2)
   199|    (h_int_eff_sq_sample : ∀ w : E, Integrable
   200|      (fun s => ‖setup.svrgOracle wTilde gradLTilde w s‖ ^ 2) setup.sampleDist)
   201|    (h_rhs_uniform : ∀ w : E,
   202|      4 * (L : ℝ) * (f w - fStar) +
   203|        2 * ‖setup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde - setup.toSGDSetup.gradF wStar‖ ^ 2 ≤ σeff ^ 2) :
   204|    HasBoundedVariance (setup.svrgOracle wTilde gradLTilde) setup.sampleDist σeff := by
   205|  intro w
   206|  refine ⟨h_int_eff_sq_sample w, ?_⟩
   207|  have h_vr0 :
   208|      ∫ s, ‖setup.toSGDSetup.gradL w s - setup.toSGDSetup.gradL wTilde s +
   209|            setup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.sampleDist
   210|        ≤ 4 * (L : ℝ) * (f w - fStar)
   211|          + 2 * ‖setup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde - setup.toSGDSetup.gradF wStar‖ ^ 2 :=
   212|    _root_.svrg_variance_reduction
   213|      (E := E) (S := S)
   214|      (gradL := setup.toSGDSetup.gradL) (gradF := setup.toSGDSetup.gradF) (f := f)
   215|      (ν := setup.sampleDist) (L := L) (wTilde := wTilde) (wStar := wStar) (fStar := fStar)
   216|      h_unif_sample h_int_oracle_sample h_pointwise_oracle w
   217|  have h_vr : ∫ s, ‖setup.svrgOracle wTilde gradLTilde w s‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.sampleDist
   218|      ≤ 4 * (L : ℝ) * (f w - fStar)
   219|        + 2 * ‖setup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde - setup.toSGDSetup.gradF wStar‖ ^ 2 := by

   222|
   223|/-- Inner-loop strongly-convex convergence for fixed-snapshot SVRG.
   224|
   225|This theorem uses the effective-SGD reduction. The caller provides a uniform
   226|effective second-moment bound for the fixed-snapshot oracle.
   227|
   228|Used in: `SVRG inner-loop strongly-convex convergence`
   229|(`Algorithms/SVRG.lean`, final inner-loop theorem) -/
   230|theorem svrg_convergence_inner_strongly_convex
   231|    (setup : SVRGSetup E S Ω) (f : E → ℝ) {L : NNReal} {μ σeff η : ℝ}
   232|    (wStar wTilde gradLTilde : E)

   234|    (hgrad : IsGradientOf f setup.toSGDSetup.gradF)
   235|    (hsmooth : IsLSmooth setup.toSGDSetup.gradF L)
   236|    (hsc : StrongConvexOn Set.univ μ f)

   238|    (hunb : IsUnbiased setup.toSGDSetup.gradL setup.toSGDSetup.gradF setup.sampleDist)
   239|    (hmin : IsMinimizer f wStar)
   240|    (h_sample_prob : IsProbabilityMeasure setup.sampleDist)
   241|    (hμ_pos : 0 < μ) (hη_pos : 0 < η) (_hη_L : η ≤ 1 / (L : ℝ))
   242|    (hημ : η * μ < 1) (hη : ∀ t, setup.toSGDSetup.η t = η)
   243|    (T : ℕ)
   244|    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
   245|    (h_intL_base : ∀ w, Integrable (setup.toSGDSetup.gradL w) setup.sampleDist)
   246|    (h_intL_eff : ∀ w, Integrable (setup.svrgOracle wTilde gradLTilde w) setup.sampleDist)
   247|    (h_int_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω =>
   248|        ‖setup.svrgOracle wTilde gradLTilde (setup.svrgProcess wTilde gradLTilde t ω)
   249|          (setup.toSGDSetup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) setup.toSGDSetup.P)
   250|    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω =>
   251|        ‖setup.svrgProcess wTilde gradLTilde t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSGDSetup.P)

* `hgradF_meas` : measurability of true gradient (Convention 2)
* `hgradF_lsmooth` : L-smoothness for variance reduction bound (L is theorem parameter)
* `hgradF_strongly_convex` : strong convexity for variance reduction bound (μ is theorem parameter) -/
structure SVRGOuterSetup
    (E : Type*) [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
      [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E]
    (S : Type*) [MeasurableSpace S]
    (Ω : Type*) [MeasurableSpace Ω] where
  toSVRGSetup : SVRGSetup E S Ω
  m : ℕ
  hgradF_meas : Measurable toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF
  hgradF_lsmooth : ∀ (L : NNReal), IsLSmooth toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF L → Prop
  hgradF_strongly_convex : ∀ (μ : ℝ), StrongConvexOn Set.univ μ toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF → Prop"}}

events.prompt_full:
## read_file result
     1|import Main
     2|import Lib.Layer1.StochasticDescent
     3|
     4|/-!
     5|# SGD Convergence Proofs — Algorithm Layer
     6|
     7|Layer: 2 (concrete algorithm proofs built on Layer 1 meta-theorems)
     8|
     9|This file converts SGD's concrete setup into the abstract `StochasticDescentHyps`
    10|and then calls the Layer 1 meta-theorems to prove convergence.
    11|
    12|## Bridge strategy
    13|
    14|The key bridge lemma `sgd_to_hyps` converts `SGDSetup` at step `t` into
    15|`StochasticDescentHyps` by discharging the two non-trivial obligations:
    16|
    17|* **Independence** (`h_indep`): `sgdProcess_indepFun_xi` proves `process t ⊥ ξ t`
    18|  because the SGD iterate at step `t` depends only on `ξ₀, …, ξ_{t-1}`, while
    19|  `ξ t` is independent of the past by `iIndepFun`.
    20|
    21|* **Distribution** (`h_dist`): `IdentDistrib (ξ t) (ξ 0) P P` gives
    22|  `Measure.map (ξ t) P = Measure.map (ξ 0) P = sampleDist`.
    23|
    24|All other fields are direct projections from `SGDSetup`.
    25|
    26|## Step equation
    27|
    28|After the bridge, the meta-theorem conclusion uses
    29|`hyps.wt ω - hyps.η • hyps.gradL (hyps.wt ω) (hyps.ξt ω)`,
    30|which equals `setup.process (t+1) ω` by `SGDSetup.process_succ`.
    31|This rewrite is the only non-trivial glue needed in each convergence theorem.
    32|
    33|## Current status
    34|
    35|* `sgd_to_hyps` — complete
    36|* `sgd_convergence_nonconvex`, `sgd_convergence_convex`,
    37|  `sgd_convergence_strongly_convex` — to be implemented (next step)
    38|-/
    39|
    40|open MeasureTheory ProbabilityTheory
    41|open scoped InnerProductSpace
    42|
    43|variable {E : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
    44|  [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E] [SecondCountableTopology E]
    45|variable {S : Type*} [MeasurableSpace S]
    46|variable {Ω : Type*} [MeasurableSpace Ω]
    47|
    48|-- ============================================================================
    49|-- Bridge: SGDSetup at step t → StochasticDescentHyps
    50|-- ============================================================================
    51|
    52|/-- Convert a `SGDSetup` at step `t` into a `StochasticDescentHyps`.
    53|
    54|Layer: 2 | This is pure glue — no mathematical content beyond what the
    55|SGD measurability and IID lemmas already provide.
    56|
    57|Key fields discharged:
    58|* `h_indep`   := `sgdProcess_indepFun_xi` (process t ⊥ ξ t, from iIndepFun + filtration)
    59|* `h_dist`    := `(hξ_ident t).map_eq` (ξ t has the same distribution as ξ 0 = sampleDist)
    60|* `h_wt_meas` := `sgdProcess_measurable` (each iterate is a measurable random variable)
    61|
    62|All remaining fields are direct projections from `SGDSetup`. -/
    63|noncomputable def sgd_to_hyps
    64|    (setup : SGDSetup E S Ω) (t : ℕ)
    65|    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.gradL))
    66|    (hgF_meas : Measurable setup.gradF)
    67|    (hunb : IsUnbiased setup.gradL setup.gradF setup.sampleDist) :
    68|    StochasticDescentHyps E S Ω where
    69|  P         := setup.P
    70|  hP        := setup.hP
    71|  ν         := setup.sampleDist
    72|  wt        := setup.process t
    73|  ξt        := setup.ξ t
    74|  gradL     := setup.gradL
    75|  gradF     := setup.gradF
    76|  η         := setup.η t
    77|  -- Independence: process t depends only on ξ 0, …, ξ (t-1), hence ⊥ ξ t
    78|  h_indep   := sgdProcess_indepFun_xi setup.hξ_meas setup.hξ_indep hgL t
    79|  -- Distribution: IdentDistrib (ξ t) (ξ 0) P P implies map(ξ t)P = sampleDist
    80|  h_dist    := (setup.hξ_ident t).map_eq
    81|  h_wt_meas := sgdProcess_measurable setup.hξ_meas hgL t
    82|  h_ξt_meas := setup.hξ_meas t
    83|  hgL       := hgL
    84|  hgF_meas  := hgF_meas
    85|  -- IsUnbiased and IsUnbiased' are definitionally equal (same body); Lean accepts directly
    86|  hunb      := hunb
    87|
    88|/-- The step equation: the meta-theorem's output form equals `setup.process (t+1)`.
    89|
    90|This is the only rewrite needed to connect Layer1 conclusions to SGD statements. -/
    91|lemma sgd_step_eq (setup : SGDSetup E S Ω) (t : ℕ)
    92|    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.gradL))
    93|    (hgF_meas : Measurable setup.gradF)
    94|    (hunb : IsUnbiased setup.gradL setup.gradF setup.sampleDist) :
    95|    let hyps := sgd_to_hyps setup t hgL hgF_meas hunb
    96|    ∀ ω, hyps.wt ω - hyps.η • hyps.gradL (hyps.wt ω) (hyps.ξt ω) =
    97|      setup.process (t + 1) ω := by
    98|  intro hyps ω
    99|  simp only [hyps, sgd_to_hyps, SGDSetup.process_succ]
   100|
   101|-- ============================================================================
   102|-- Convergence theorems (to be implemented in the next step)
   103|-- ============================================================================
   104|
   105|/-- **Non-convex SGD convergence** via Layer1 meta-theorem `stochastic_descent_nonconvex'`.
   106|
   107|Proof outline:
   108|1. `hstep`: for each t, convert `SGDSetup` to `StochasticDescentHyps` via `sgd_to_hyps`,
   109|   call the meta-theorem, rewrite `process(t+1) = process t − η t • gradL` (process_succ),
   110|   then substitute `η t = η`.
   111|2. `hsum`: telescope the per-step bounds → η·Σ‖∇f‖² ≤ (f(w₀) − E[f(w_T)]) + T·η²Lσ²/2.
   112|3. `hlb`: E[f(w_T)] ≥ f* (f is bounded below).
   113|4. Algebraic rearrangement and division by η·T. -/
   114|theorem sgd_convergence_nonconvex_v2
   115|    (setup : SGDSetup E S Ω) (f : E → ℝ) {L : NNReal} {σ η f_star : ℝ}
   116|    (hgrad : IsGradientOf f setup.gradF)
   117|    (hsmooth : IsLSmooth setup.gradF L)
   118|    (hvar : HasBoundedVariance setup.gradL setup.sampleDist σ)
   119|    (hunb : IsUnbiased setup.gradL setup.gradF setup.sampleDist)
   120|    (hlower : ∀ w, f_star ≤ f w)
   121|    (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hη : ∀ t, setup.η t = η)
   122|    (T : ℕ) (hT : 0 < T)
   123|    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.gradL))
   124|    (h_intL : ∀ w, Integrable (setup.gradL w) setup.sampleDist)
   125|    (h_int_f : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω => f (setup.process t ω)) setup.P)
   126|    (h_int_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω =>
   127|        ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) setup.P)
   128|    (h_int_inner : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω =>
   129|        ⟪setup.gradF (setup.process t ω), setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)⟫_ℝ)
   130|      setup.P) :
   131|    (1 / (T : ℝ)) * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T,
   132|        ∫ ω, ‖setup.gradF (setup.process t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤
   133|      2 * (f setup.w₀ - f_star) / (η * T) + η * (L : ℝ) * σ ^ 2 := by
   134|  haveI := setup.hP
   135|  -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
   136|  -- Step 1: per-step descent bound via bridge + meta-theorem
   137|  -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
   138|  have hstep : ∀ t < T,
   139|      ∫ ω, f (setup.process (t + 1) ω) ∂setup.P ≤
   140|        ∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P
   141|        - η * ∫ ω, ‖setup.gradF (setup.process t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P
   142|        + η ^ 2 * (L : ℝ) * σ ^ 2 / 2 := fun t _ => by
   143|    -- process(t+1) = process t − η_t • gradL  (by process_succ)
   144|    -- apply meta-theorem via bridge, then substitute η_t = η
   145|    calc ∫ ω, f (setup.process (t + 1) ω) ∂setup.P
   146|        = ∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω -
   147|              setup.η t • setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)) ∂setup.P := by
   148|            -- process_succ is proved by rfl (definitional), so the integrals are equal
   149|            apply integral_congr_ae
   150|            exact Filter.Eventually.of_forall fun _ => rfl
   151|      _ ≤ ∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P
   152|            - setup.η t * ∫ ω, ‖setup.gradF (setup.process t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P
   153|            + (setup.η t) ^ 2 * (L : ℝ) * σ ^ 2 / 2 :=
   154|            -- Fields of sgd_to_hyps reduce definitionally to SGDSetup projections,
   155|            -- so the meta-theorem's conclusion matches this form exactly.
   156|            stochastic_descent_nonconvex'
   157|              (sgd_to_hyps setup t hgL (hsmooth.continuous.measurable) hunb)
   158|              f hgrad hsmooth hvar h_intL
   159|              (h_int_f t) (h_int_f (t + 1)) (h_int_inner t) (h_int_sq t)
   160|      _ = ∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P
   161|            - η * ∫ ω, ‖setup.gradF (setup.process t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P
   162|            + η ^ 2 * (L : ℝ) * σ ^ 2 / 2 := by rw [hη t]
   163|  -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
   164|  -- Step 2: sum and telescope
   165|  -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
   166|  have hsum : η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T,
   167|        ∫ ω, ‖setup.gradF (setup.process t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤
   168|      f setup.w₀ - ∫ ω, f (setup.process T ω) ∂setup.P +
   169|        (T : ℝ) * (η ^ 2 * (L : ℝ) * σ ^ 2 / 2) := by
   170|    set a := fun t => ∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P
   171|    set b := fun t => ∫ ω, ‖setup.gradF (setup.process t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P
   172|    have h_rearr : ∀ t, t < T → η * b t ≤ (a t - a (t + 1)) + η ^ 2 * (L : ℝ) * σ ^ 2 / 2 :=
   173|      fun t ht => by simp only [a, b]; linarith [hstep t ht]
   174|    have h_sum_le := Finset.sum_le_sum (fun t ht => h_rearr t (Finset.mem_range.mp ht))
   175|    rw [← Finset.mul_sum] at h_sum_le
   176|    simp only [Finset.sum_add_distrib, Finset.sum_const, Finset.card_range, nsmul_eq_mul] at h_sum_le
   177|    have h_tele : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (a t - a (t + 1)) = a 0 - a T := by
   178|      simp_rw [show ∀ t, a t - a (t + 1) = -(a (t + 1) - a t) from fun t => by ring]
   179|      rw [Finset.sum_neg_distrib, Finset.sum_range_sub]; ring
   180|    rw [h_tele] at h_sum_le
   181|    have h_init : a 0 = f setup.w₀ := by
   182|      simp [a, SGDSetup.process_zero, integral_const, probReal_univ]
   183|    rw [h_init] at h_sum_le; linarith
   184|  -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
   185|  -- Step 3: E[f(w_T)] ≥ f*
   186|  -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
   187|  have hlb : f_star ≤ ∫ ω, f (setup.process T ω) ∂setup.P := by
   188|    calc f_star = ∫ _, f_star ∂setup.P := by
   189|              rw [integral_const, smul_eq_mul, probReal_univ, one_mul]
   190|      _ ≤ ∫ ω, f (setup.process T ω) ∂setup.P := by
   191|              apply integral_mono (integrable_const _) (h_int_f T)
   192|              intro ω; exact hlower _
   193|  -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
   194|  -- Step 4: algebraic rearrangement and division by η·T
   195|  -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
   196|  have hT_pos : (0 : ℝ) < T := Nat.cast_pos.mpr hT
   197|  have hηT_pos : (0 : ℝ) < η * T := mul_pos hη_pos hT_pos
   198|  have h_comb : η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T,
   199|        ∫ ω, ‖setup.gradF (setup.process t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤
   200|      (f setup.w₀ - f_star) + ↑T * (η ^ 2 * ↑↑L * σ ^ 2 / 2) := by linarith
   201|  have h_weak : η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T,
   202|        ∫ ω, ‖setup.gradF (setup.process t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤
   203|      2 * (f setup.w₀ - f_star) + ↑T * (η ^ 2 * ↑↑L * σ ^ 2) := by
   204|    have h_fstar : (0 : ℝ) ≤ f setup.w₀ - f_star := by linarith [hlower setup.w₀]
   205|    have h_noise : (0 : ℝ) ≤ ↑T * (η ^ 2 * ↑↑L * σ ^ 2 / 2) := by positivity
   206|    linarith
   207|  have h_div : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T,
   208|        ∫ ω, ‖setup.gradF (setup.process t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤
   209|      (2 * (f setup.w₀ - f_star) + ↑T * (η ^ 2 * ↑↑L * σ ^ 2)) / η := by
   210|    rw [le_div_iff₀ hη_pos]; linarith
   211|  calc (1 / (T : ℝ)) * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T,
   212|          ∫ ω, ‖setup.gradF (setup.process t ω)‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P
   213|      ≤ (1 / ↑T) * ((2 * (f setup.w₀ - f_star) + ↑T * (η ^ 2 * ↑↑L * σ ^ 2)) / η) :=
   214|          mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left h_div (by positivity : (0 : ℝ) ≤ 1 / ↑T)
   215|    _ = 2 * (f setup.w₀ - f_star) / (η * ↑T) + η * ↑↑L * σ ^ 2 := by field_simp
   216|
   217|/-- **Convex SGD convergence** via `stochastic_descent_convex'`.
   218|
   219|Proof outline:
   220|1. `hstep`: at each t, build `hyps` via `sgd_to_hyps`, call `stochastic_descent_convex'`
   221|   to get `E[‖w_{t+1}−w*‖²] ≤ E[‖w_t−w*‖²] − 2η(E[f(w_t)]−f*) + η²σ²`,
   222|   then rewrite `process(t+1) = process t − η_t • gradL` (rfl) and `η_t = η`.
   223|2. `hsum`: telescope the per-step bounds over t = 0..T−1.
   224|3. Drop `‖w_T−w*‖² ≥ 0` and divide by 2ηT. -/
   225|theorem sgd_convergence_convex_v2
   226|    (setup : SGDSetup E S Ω) (f : E → ℝ) {L : NNReal} {σ η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
   227|    (hgrad : IsGradientOf f setup.gradF)
   228|    (hsmooth : IsLSmooth setup.gradF L)
   229|    (hconvex : ConvexOn ℝ Set.univ f)
   230|    (hvar : HasBoundedVariance setup.gradL setup.sampleDist σ)
   231|    (hunb : IsUnbiased setup.gradL setup.gradF setup.sampleDist)
   232|    (_hmin : IsMinimizer f wStar)
   233|    (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hη : ∀ t, setup.η t = η)
   234|    (T : ℕ) (hT : 0 < T)
   235|    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.gradL))
   236|    (h_intL : ∀ w, Integrable (setup.gradL w) setup.sampleDist)
   237|    (h_int_f : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω => f (setup.process t ω)) setup.P)
   238|    (h_int_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω =>
   239|        ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) setup.P)
   240|    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω =>
   241|        ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.P)
   242|    (h_int_inner : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω =>
   243|        ⟪setup.process t ω - wStar, setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)⟫_ℝ)
   244|      setup.P)
   245|    (h_int_gF_inner : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω =>
   246|        ⟪setup.process t ω - wStar, setup.gradF (setup.process t ω)⟫_ℝ) setup.P) :
   247|    (1 / (T : ℝ)) * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T,
   248|        (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
   249|      ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 / (2 * η * T) + η * σ ^ 2 / 2 := by
   250|  haveI := setup.hP
   251|  -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
   252|  -- Step 1: per-step norm-squared descent via bridge + meta-theorem
   253|  -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
   254|  have hstep : ∀ t < T,
   255|      ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤
   256|        ∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P
   257|        - 2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar)
   258|        + η ^ 2 * σ ^ 2 := fun t _ => by
   259|    calc ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (t + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P
   260|        = ∫ ω, ‖(setup.process t ω -
   261|              setup.η t • setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)) - wStar‖ ^ 2
   262|            ∂setup.P := by
   263|            apply integral_congr_ae
   264|            exact Filter.Eventually.of_forall fun _ => rfl
   265|      _ ≤ ∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P
   266|            - 2 * setup.η t * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar)
   267|            + (setup.η t) ^ 2 * σ ^ 2 :=
   268|            stochastic_descent_convex'
   269|              (sgd_to_hyps setup t hgL (hsmooth.continuous.measurable) hunb)
   270|              f wStar hgrad hconvex hvar
   271|              (by show 0 < setup.η t; linarith [hη t])
   272|              h_intL
   273|              (h_int_inner t) (h_int_sq t) (h_int_norm_sq t) (h_int_f t) (h_int_gF_inner t)
   274|      _ = ∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P
   275|            - 2 * η * (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar)
   276|            + η ^ 2 * σ ^ 2 := by rw [hη t]
   277|  -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
   278|  -- Step 2: sum and telescope → 2η · Σ(gap) ≤ ‖w₀−w*‖² − ‖w_T−w*‖² + T·η²σ²
   279|  -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
   280|  have hsum : 2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T,
   281|        (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
   282|      ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 -
   283|        ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P +
   284|        (T : ℝ) * (η ^ 2 * σ ^ 2) := by
   285|    set a := fun t => ∫ ω, ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P
   286|    set gap := fun t => ∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar
   287|    have h_rearr : ∀ t, t < T → 2 * η * gap t ≤ (a t - a (t + 1)) + η ^ 2 * σ ^ 2 :=
   288|      fun t ht => by simp only [a, gap]; linarith [hstep t ht]
   289|    have h_sum_le := Finset.sum_le_sum (fun t ht => h_rearr t (Finset.mem_range.mp ht))
   290|    rw [← Finset.mul_sum] at h_sum_le
   291|    simp only [Finset.sum_add_distrib, Finset.sum_const,
   292|               Finset.card_range, nsmul_eq_mul] at h_sum_le
   293|    have h_tele : ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T, (a t - a (t + 1)) = a 0 - a T := by
   294|      simp_rw [show ∀ t, a t - a (t + 1) = -(a (t + 1) - a t) from fun t => by ring]
   295|      rw [Finset.sum_neg_distrib, Finset.sum_range_sub]; ring
   296|    rw [h_tele] at h_sum_le
   297|    have h_init : a 0 = ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 := by
   298|      simp [a, SGDSetup.process, sgdProcess, integral_const, probReal_univ]
   299|    rw [h_init] at h_sum_le; linarith
   300|  -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
   301|  -- Step 3: drop ‖w_T − w*‖² ≥ 0 and divide by 2ηT
   302|  -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
   303|  have h_norm_nonneg : 0 ≤ ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P :=
   304|    integral_nonneg fun ω => sq_nonneg _
   305|  have h_drop : 2 * η * ∑ t ∈ Finset.range T,
   306|        (∫ ω, f (setup.process t ω) ∂setup.P - f wStar) ≤
   307|      ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 + (T : ℝ) * (η ^ 2 * σ ^ 2) := by linarith
   308|  have hT_pos : (0 : ℝ) < T := Nat.cast_pos.mpr hT
   309|  have hη2_pos : (0 : ℝ) < 2 * η := by linarith
   310|  rw [one_div, inv_mul_le_iff₀ hT_pos]
   311|  have h_rhs : ↑T * (‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 / (2 * η * ↑T) + η * σ ^ 2 / 2) =
   312|      (‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 + ↑T * (η ^ 2 * σ ^ 2)) / (2 * η) := by field_simp
   313|  rw [h_rhs, le_div_iff₀ hη2_pos]; linarith
   314|
   315|/-- **Strongly convex SGD convergence** via `stochastic_descent_strongly_convex'`.
   316|
   317|Proof outline:
   318|- Induction on T.
   319|- Base (T=0): `process 0 = w₀` (definitional), integral of a constant = constant.
   320|- Step (T+1): call `stochastic_descent_strongly_convex'` via `sgd_to_hyps` to get
   321|  `E[‖w_{T+1}−w*‖²] ≤ (1−ημ)·E[‖w_T−w*‖²] + η²σ²`, then chain with `ih` via `gcongr`.
   322|  The noise accumulates as a geometric series: the identity
   323|  `(1−ημ)·(ησ²/μ) + η²σ² = ησ²/μ` closes the induction. -/
   324|theorem sgd_convergence_strongly_convex_v2
   325|    (setup : SGDSetup E S Ω) (f : E → ℝ) {L : NNReal} {μ σ η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
   326|    (hgrad : IsGradientOf f setup.gradF)
   327|    (hsmooth : IsLSmooth setup.gradF L)
   328|    (hsc : StrongConvexOn Set.univ μ f)
   329|    (hvar : HasBoundedVariance setup.gradL setup.sampleDist σ)
   330|    (hunb : IsUnbiased setup.gradL setup.gradF setup.sampleDist)
   331|    (hmin : IsMinimizer f wStar)
   332|    (hμ_pos : 0 < μ) (hη_pos : 0 < η) (_hη_L : η ≤ 1 / (L : ℝ))
   333|    (hημ : η * μ < 1) (hη : ∀ t, setup.η t = η)
   334|    (T : ℕ)
   335|    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.gradL))
   336|    (h_intL : ∀ w, Integrable (setup.gradL w) setup.sampleDist)
   337|    (h_int_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω =>
   338|        ‖setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)‖ ^ 2) setup.P)
   339|    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω =>
   340|        ‖setup.process t ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.P)
   341|    (h_int_inner : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω =>
   342|        ⟪setup.process t ω - wStar, setup.gradL (setup.process t ω) (setup.ξ t ω)⟫_ℝ)
   343|      setup.P)
   344|    (h_int_gF_inner : ∀ t, Integrable (fun ω =>
   345|        ⟪setup.process t ω - wStar, setup.gradF (setup.process t ω)⟫_ℝ) setup.P) :
   346|    ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤
   347|      (1 - η * μ) ^ T * ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 + η * σ ^ 2 / μ := by
   348|  haveI := setup.hP
   349|  have h_nonneg : 0 ≤ 1 - η * μ := by linarith
   350|  induction T with
   351|  | zero =>
   352|    -- process 0 = w₀ (definitional); integral of constant = constant on prob. space
   353|    simp only [SGDSetup.process, sgdProcess, pow_zero, one_mul]
   354|    rw [integral_const, smul_eq_mul, probReal_univ, one_mul]
   355|    linarith [div_nonneg (mul_nonneg (le_of_lt hη_pos) (sq_nonneg σ)) (le_of_lt hμ_pos)]
   356|  | succ T ih =>
   357|    -- Per-step contraction at step T via bridge + meta-theorem
   358|    have hstep : ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (T + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P ≤
   359|        (1 - η * μ) * ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P
   360|        + η ^ 2 * σ ^ 2 := by
   361|      calc ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (T + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P
   362|          = ∫ ω, ‖(setup.process T ω -
   363|                setup.η T • setup.gradL (setup.process T ω) (setup.ξ T ω)) - wStar‖ ^ 2
   364|              ∂setup.P := by
   365|              apply integral_congr_ae
   366|              exact Filter.Eventually.of_forall fun _ => rfl
   367|        _ ≤ (1 - setup.η T * μ) * ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P
   368|              + (setup.η T) ^ 2 * σ ^ 2 :=
   369|              -- μ σ are implicit, inferred from hsc/hvar; wStar is first explicit arg after f
   370|              stochastic_descent_strongly_convex'
   371|                (sgd_to_hyps setup T hgL (hsmooth.continuous.measurable) hunb)
   372|                f wStar hgrad hsc hvar hmin hμ_pos
   373|                (by show 0 < setup.η T; linarith [hη T])
   374|                h_intL
   375|                (h_int_inner T) (h_int_sq T) (h_int_norm_sq T) (h_int_gF_inner T)
   376|        _ = (1 - η * μ) * ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P
   377|              + η ^ 2 * σ ^ 2 := by rw [hη T]
   378|    -- Noise term: (1−ημ)·(ησ²/μ) + η²σ² = ησ²/μ (geometric series identity)
   379|    have hkey : (1 - η * μ) * ((1 - η * μ) ^ T * ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 + η * σ ^ 2 / μ) +
   380|        η ^ 2 * σ ^ 2 = (1 - η * μ) ^ (T + 1) * ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 + η * σ ^ 2 / μ := by
   381|      have hne : μ ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt hμ_pos
   382|      field_simp; ring
   383|    -- Chain: per-step bound → induction hypothesis → closed form
   384|    calc ∫ ω, ‖setup.process (T + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P
   385|        ≤ (1 - η * μ) * ∫ ω, ‖setup.process T ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.P
   386|            + η ^ 2 * σ ^ 2 := hstep
   387|      _ ≤ (1 - η * μ) * ((1 - η * μ) ^ T * ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 + η * σ ^ 2 / μ)
   388|            + η ^ 2 * σ ^ 2 := by gcongr
   389|      _ = (1 - η * μ) ^ (T + 1) * ‖setup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 + η * σ ^ 2 / μ := hkey

import Algorithms.SVRG
import Lib.Glue.Measurable
import Lib.Glue.Probability

open MeasureTheory ProbabilityTheory
open scoped InnerProductSpace

variable {E : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
  [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E] [SecondCountableTopology E]
variable {S : Type*} [MeasurableSpace S]
variable {Ω : Type*} [MeasurableSpace Ω]

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 1: SVRG Outer-Loop Setup Structure
-- ============================================================================

/-- SVRG outer-loop setup: extends `SVRGSetup` with epoch-level parameters.

Archetype: B (macro-level epoch telescoping with periodic snapshot updates)

Fields:
* `toSVRGSetup` : base SVRG infrastructure (oracle, samples, step sizes)
* `m` : epoch length (inner steps per epoch)
* `hgradF_meas` : measurability of true gradient (Convention 2)
* `hgradF_lsmooth` : L-smoothness for variance reduction bound
* `hgradF_strongly_convex` : strong convexity for variance reduction bound -/
structure SVRGOuterSetup
    (E : Type*) [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
      [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E]
    (S : Type*) [MeasurableSpace S]
    (Ω : Type*) [MeasurableSpace Ω] where
  toSVRGSetup : SVRGSetup E S Ω
  m : ℕ
  hgradF_meas : Measurable toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF
  hgradF_lsmooth : IsLSmooth toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF ⟨1, by norm_num⟩
  hgradF_strongly_convex : StrongConvexOn Set.univ μ toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF

namespace SVRGOuterSetup

variable (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω)

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 2: Outer-Loop Process Definition
-- ============================================================================

/-- SVRG outer-loop process: epoch-level recursion where each epoch runs `m` inner steps.

Update rule: `w_{k+1} = svrgProcess w_k (gradF w_k) m`
where snapshot `wTilde = w_k` (epoch start point) and `gradLTilde = gradF w_k`.

Archetype: B (macro) — snapshot updates every epoch, requires explicit telescoping.
Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, main convergence theorem) -/
noncomputable def svrgOuterProcess : ℕ → ℕ → Ω → E
  | _, 0 => fun _ => setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀
  | m, k + 1 => fun ω =>
      let w_k := setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω
      setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess w_k (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF w_k) m ω

omit [SecondCountableTopology E] in
@[simp] theorem svrgOuterProcess_zero (m : ℕ) :
    setup.svrgOuterProcess m 0 = fun _ => setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ := rfl

omit [SecondCountableTopology E] in
@[simp] theorem svrgOuterProcess_succ (m : ℕ) (k : ℕ) :
    setup.svrgOuterProcess m (k + 1) = fun ω =>
      setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)) m ω := rfl

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 3: Measurability Infrastructure
-- ============================================================================

/-- Measurability of outer-loop iterates.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, integrability hypotheses) -/
theorem svrgOuterProcess_measurable (m k : ℕ) :
    Measurable (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k) := by
  induction k with
  | zero => exact measurable_const
  | succ k ih =>
      simp only [svrgOuterProcess]
      -- svrgProcess is measurable when snapshot and gradLTilde are measurable
      have h1 : Measurable (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF ∘ setup.svrgOuterProcess m k) :=
        setup.hgradF_meas.comp ih
      have h2 : Measurable (setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k)
          (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF ∘ setup.svrgOuterProcess m k) m) := by
        -- svrgProcess_measurable requires measurable snapshot and gradLTilde
        simpa [Function.comp] using
          setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess_measurable
            (wTilde := setup.svrgOuterProcess m k)
            (gradLTilde := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF ∘ setup.svrgOuterProcess m k)
            (hgL := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.measurable_svrgOracle
              (wTilde := setup.svrgOuterProcess m k)
              (gradLTilde := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF ∘ setup.svrgOuterProcess m k)
              (by sorry)) -- TODO: need joint measurability of gradF ∘ process
      exact h2

/-- Adaptedness of outer-loop process to `sgdFiltration`.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, independence proof) -/
theorem svrgOuterProcess_adapted (m : ℕ) :
    Adapted (sgdFiltration setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.ξ
      setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.hξ_meas) (setup.svrgOuterProcess m) := by
  intro k
  induction k with
  | zero => exact measurable_const
  | succ k ih =>
      simp only [svrgOuterProcess]
      -- Similar structure to svrgProcess_adapted
      sorry

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 4: Epoch Contraction Lemma
-- ============================================================================

/-- Epoch contraction lemma for SVRG outer loop.

Archetype: B — requires dual integrability hypotheses (`h_int_norm_sq` + `h_int_virtual`)
per GLUE_TRICKS.md Section 4b.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, epoch telescoping base) -/
theorem epoch_contraction_lemma
    (f : E → ℝ) {L : NNReal} {μ σ_eff η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    (hgrad : IsGradientOf f setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF)
    (hsmooth : IsLSmooth setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF L)
    (hsc : StrongConvexOn Set.univ μ f)
    (hmin : IsMinimizer f wStar)
    (hμ_pos : 0 < μ) (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hημ : η * μ < 1)
    (hη : ∀ t, setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.η t = η)
    (m : ℕ) (hm : 0 < m)
    (hvar_svrg : ∀ w wTilde, ∫ s, ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgOracle wTilde
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde) w s‖ ^ 2
        ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist ≤
        4 * (L : ℝ) * (f w - f wStar) +
          2 * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde -
            setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wStar‖ ^ 2)
    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_virtual : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)
          (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)) m ω - wStar‖ ^ 2)
        setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (h_intL_base : ∀ w, Integrable (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL w)
        setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist)
    (k : ℕ) :
    ∫ ω, ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m (k + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2
        ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
      (1 - η * μ) ^ m * ∫ ω, ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2
        ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P + η * σ_eff ^ 2 / μ := by
  haveI := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.hP
  -- Step 1: Unfold svrgOuterProcess_succ to expose svrgProcess
  have h_unfold : setup.svrgOuterProcess m (k + 1) = fun ω =>
      setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)) m ω :=
    rfl
  rw [h_unfold]
  -- Step 2: Apply inner-loop convergence theorem
  -- svrg_convergence_inner_strongly_convex with:
  --   wTilde := setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω (random variable, not fixed!)
  --   gradLTilde := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde
  -- BRIDGE NEEDED: svrg_convergence_inner_strongly_convex expects fixed wTilde : E,
  -- but we have wTilde : Ω → E. This is a Level 2 gap requiring a bridge lemma.
  sorry

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 5: Outer-Loop Convergence Theorem
-- ============================================================================

/-- SVRG outer-loo

import Algorithms.SVRG
import Lib.Glue.Measurable
import Lib.Glue.Probability

open MeasureTheory ProbabilityTheory
open scoped InnerProductSpace

variable {E : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
  [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E] [SecondCountableTopology E]
variable {S : Type*} [MeasurableSpace S]
variable {Ω : Type*} [MeasurableSpace Ω]

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 1: SVRG Outer-Loop Setup Structure
-- ============================================================================

/-- SVRG outer-loop setup: extends `SVRGSetup` with epoch-level parameters.

Archetype: B (macro-level epoch telescoping with periodic snapshot updates)

Fields:
* `toSVRGSetup` : base SVRG infrastructure (oracle, samples, step sizes)
* `m` : epoch length (inner steps per epoch)
* `hgradF_meas` : measurability of true gradient (Convention 2)
* `hgradF_lsmooth` : L-smoothness for variance reduction bound
* `hgradF_strongly_convex` : strong convexity for variance reduction bound -/
structure SVRGOuterSetup
    (E : Type*) [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
      [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E]
    (S : Type*) [MeasurableSpace S]
    (Ω : Type*) [MeasurableSpace Ω] where
  toSVRGSetup : SVRGSetup E S Ω
  m : ℕ
  hgradF_meas : Measurable toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF
  hgradF_lsmooth : IsLSmooth toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF ⟨1, by norm_num⟩
  hgradF_strongly_convex : StrongConvexOn Set.univ μ toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF

namespace SVRGOuterSetup

variable (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω)

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 2: Outer-Loop Process Definition
-- ============================================================================

/-- SVRG outer-loop process: epoch-level recursion where each epoch runs `m` inner steps.

Update rule: `w_{k+1} = svrgProcess w_k (gradF w_k) m`
where snapshot `wTilde = w_k` (epoch start point) and `gradLTilde = gradF w_k`.

Archetype: B (macro) — snapshot updates every epoch, requires explicit telescoping.
Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, main convergence theorem) -/
noncomputable def svrgOuterProcess : ℕ → ℕ → Ω → E
  | _, 0 => fun _ => setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀
  | m, k + 1 => fun ω =>
      let w_k := setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω
      setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess w_k (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF w_k) m ω

omit [SecondCountableTopology E] in
@[simp] theorem svrgOuterProcess_zero (m : ℕ) :
    setup.svrgOuterProcess m 0 = fun _ => setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ := rfl

omit [SecondCountableTopology E] in
@[simp] theorem svrgOuterProcess_succ (m : ℕ) (k : ℕ) :
    setup.svrgOuterProcess m (k + 1) = fun ω =>
      setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)) m ω := rfl

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 3: Measurability Infrastructure
-- ============================================================================

/-- Measurability of outer-loop iterates.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, integrability hypotheses) -/
theorem svrgOuterProcess_measurable (m k : ℕ) :
    Measurable (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k) := by
  induction k with
  | zero => exact measurable_const
  | succ k ih =>
      simp only [svrgOuterProcess]
      -- svrgProcess is measurable when snapshot and gradLTilde are measurable
      have h1 : Measurable (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF ∘ setup.svrgOuterProcess m k) :=
        setup.hgradF_meas.comp ih
      have h2 : Measurable (setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k)
          (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF ∘ setup.svrgOuterProcess m k) m) := by
        -- svrgProcess_measurable requires measurable snapshot and gradLTilde
        simpa [Function.comp] using
          setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess_measurable
            (wTilde := setup.svrgOuterProcess m k)
            (gradLTilde := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF ∘ setup.svrgOuterProcess m k)
            (hgL := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.measurable_svrgOracle
              (wTilde := setup.svrgOuterProcess m k)
              (gradLTilde := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF ∘ setup.svrgOuterProcess m k)
              (by sorry)) -- TODO: need joint measurability of gradF ∘ process
      exact h2

/-- Adaptedness of outer-loop process to `sgdFiltration`.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, independence proof) -/
theorem svrgOuterProcess_adapted (m : ℕ) :
    Adapted (sgdFiltration setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.ξ
      setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.hξ_meas) (setup.svrgOuterProcess m) := by
  intro k
  induction k with
  | zero => exact measurable_const
  | succ k ih =>
      simp only [svrgOuterProcess]
      -- Similar structure to svrgProcess_adapted
      sorry

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 4: Epoch Contraction Lemma
-- ============================================================================

/-- Epoch contraction lemma for SVRG outer loop.

Archetype: B — requires dual integrability hypotheses (`h_int_norm_sq` + `h_int_virtual`)
per GLUE_TRICKS.md Section 4b.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, epoch telescoping base) -/
theorem epoch_contraction_lemma
    (f : E → ℝ) {L : NNReal} {μ σ_eff η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    (hgrad : IsGradientOf f setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF)
    (hsmooth : IsLSmooth setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF L)
    (hsc : StrongConvexOn Set.univ μ f)
    (hmin : IsMinimizer f wStar)
    (hμ_pos : 0 < μ) (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hημ : η * μ < 1)
    (hη : ∀ t, setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.η t = η)
    (m : ℕ) (hm : 0 < m)
    (hvar_svrg : ∀ w wTilde, ∫ s, ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgOracle wTilde
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde) w s‖ ^ 2
        ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist ≤
        4 * (L : ℝ) * (f w - f wStar) +
          2 * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde -
            setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wStar‖ ^ 2)
    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_virtual : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)
          (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)) m ω - wStar‖ ^ 2)
        setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (h_intL_base : ∀ w, Integrable (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL w)
        setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist)
    (k : ℕ) :
    ∫ ω, ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m (k + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2
        ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
      (1 - η * μ) ^ m * ∫ ω, ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2
        ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P + η * σ_eff ^ 2 / μ := by
  haveI := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.hP
  -- Step 1: Unfold svrgOuterProcess_succ to expose svrgProcess
  have h_unfold : setup.svrgOuterProcess m (k + 1) = fun ω =>
      setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)) m ω :=
    rfl
  rw [h_unfold]
  -- Step 2: Apply inner-loop convergence theorem
  -- svrg_convergence_inner_strongly_convex with:
  --   wTilde := setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω (random variable, not fixed!)
  --   gradLTilde := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde
  -- BRIDGE NEEDED: svrg_convergence_inner_strongly_convex expects fixed wTilde : E,
  -- but we have wTilde : Ω → E. This is a Level 2 gap requiring a bridge lemma.
  sorry

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 5: Outer-Loop Convergence Theorem
-- ============================================================================

/-- SVRG outer-loo

import Algorithms.SVRG
import Lib.Glue.Measurable
import Lib.Glue.Probability

open MeasureTheory ProbabilityTheory
open scoped InnerProductSpace

variable {E : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
  [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E] [SecondCountableTopology E]
variable {S : Type*} [MeasurableSpace S]
variable {Ω : Type*} [MeasurableSpace Ω]

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 1: SVRG Outer-Loop Setup Structure
-- ============================================================================

/-- SVRG outer-loop setup: extends `SVRGSetup` with epoch-level parameters.

Archetype: B (macro-level epoch telescoping with periodic snapshot updates)

Fields:
* `toSVRGSetup` : base SVRG infrastructure (oracle, samples, step sizes)
* `m` : epoch length (inner steps per epoch)
* `hgradF_meas` : measurability of true gradient (Convention 2)
* `hgradF_lsmooth` : L-smoothness for variance reduction bound
* `hgradF_strongly_convex` : strong convexity for variance reduction bound -/
structure SVRGOuterSetup
    (E : Type*) [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
      [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E]
    (S : Type*) [MeasurableSpace S]
    (Ω : Type*) [MeasurableSpace Ω] where
  toSVRGSetup : SVRGSetup E S Ω
  m : ℕ
  hgradF_meas : Measurable toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF
  hgradF_lsmooth : IsLSmooth toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF ⟨1, by norm_num⟩
  hgradF_strongly_convex : StrongConvexOn Set.univ μ toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF

namespace SVRGOuterSetup

variable (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω)

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 2: Outer-Loop Process Definition
-- ============================================================================

/-- SVRG outer-loop process: epoch-level recursion where each epoch runs `m` inner steps.

Update rule: `w_{k+1} = svrgProcess w_k (gradF w_k) m`
where snapshot `wTilde = w_k` (epoch start point) and `gradLTilde = gradF w_k`.

Archetype: B (macro) — snapshot updates every epoch, requires explicit telescoping.
Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, main convergence theorem) -/
noncomputable def svrgOuterProcess : ℕ → ℕ → Ω → E
  | _, 0 => fun _ => setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀
  | m, k + 1 => fun ω =>
      let w_k := setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω
      setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess w_k (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF w_k) m ω

omit [SecondCountableTopology E] in
@[simp] theorem svrgOuterProcess_zero (m : ℕ) :
    setup.svrgOuterProcess m 0 = fun _ => setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ := rfl

omit [SecondCountableTopology E] in
@[simp] theorem svrgOuterProcess_succ (m : ℕ) (k : ℕ) :
    setup.svrgOuterProcess m (k + 1) = fun ω =>
      setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)) m ω := rfl

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 3: Measurability Infrastructure
-- ============================================================================

/-- Measurability of outer-loop iterates.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, integrability hypotheses) -/
theorem svrgOuterProcess_measurable (m k : ℕ) :
    Measurable (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k) := by
  induction k with
  | zero => exact measurable_const
  | succ k ih =>
      simp only [svrgOuterProcess]
      -- svrgProcess is measurable when snapshot and gradLTilde are measurable
      have h1 : Measurable (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF ∘ setup.svrgOuterProcess m k) :=
        setup.hgradF_meas.comp ih
      have h2 : Measurable (setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k)
          (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF ∘ setup.svrgOuterProcess m k) m) := by
        -- svrgProcess_measurable requires measurable snapshot and gradLTilde
        simpa [Function.comp] using
          setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess_measurable
            (wTilde := setup.svrgOuterProcess m k)
            (gradLTilde := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF ∘ setup.svrgOuterProcess m k)
            (hgL := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.measurable_svrgOracle
              (wTilde := setup.svrgOuterProcess m k)
              (gradLTilde := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF ∘ setup.svrgOuterProcess m k)
              (by sorry)) -- TODO: need joint measurability of gradF ∘ process
      exact h2

/-- Adaptedness of outer-loop process to `sgdFiltration`.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, independence proof) -/
theorem svrgOuterProcess_adapted (m : ℕ) :
    Adapted (sgdFiltration setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.ξ
      setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.hξ_meas) (setup.svrgOuterProcess m) := by
  intro k
  induction k with
  | zero => exact measurable_const
  | succ k ih =>
      simp only [svrgOuterProcess]
      -- Similar structure to svrgProcess_adapted
      sorry

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 4: Epoch Contraction Lemma
-- ============================================================================

/-- Epoch contraction lemma for SVRG outer loop.

Archetype: B — requires dual integrability hypotheses (`h_int_norm_sq` + `h_int_virtual`)
per GLUE_TRICKS.md Section 4b.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, epoch telescoping base) -/
theorem epoch_contraction_lemma
    (f : E → ℝ) {L : NNReal} {μ σ_eff η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    (hgrad : IsGradientOf f setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF)
    (hsmooth : IsLSmooth setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF L)
    (hsc : StrongConvexOn Set.univ μ f)
    (hmin : IsMinimizer f wStar)
    (hμ_pos : 0 < μ) (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hημ : η * μ < 1)
    (hη : ∀ t, setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.η t = η)
    (m : ℕ) (hm : 0 < m)
    (hvar_svrg : ∀ w wTilde, ∫ s, ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgOracle wTilde
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde) w s‖ ^ 2
        ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist ≤
        4 * (L : ℝ) * (f w - f wStar) +
          2 * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde -
            setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wStar‖ ^ 2)
    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_virtual : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)
          (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)) m ω - wStar‖ ^ 2)
        setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (h_intL_base : ∀ w, Integrable (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL w)
        setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist)
    (k : ℕ) :
    ∫ ω, ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m (k + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2
        ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
      (1 - η * μ) ^ m * ∫ ω, ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2
        ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P + η * σ_eff ^ 2 / μ := by
  haveI := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.hP
  -- Step 1: Unfold svrgOuterProcess_succ to expose svrgProcess
  have h_unfold : setup.svrgOuterProcess m (k + 1) = fun ω =>
      setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)) m ω :=
    rfl
  rw [h_unfold]
  -- Step 2: Apply inner-loop convergence theorem
  -- svrg_convergence_inner_strongly_convex with:
  --   wTilde := setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω (random variable, not fixed!)
  --   gradLTilde := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde
  -- BRIDGE NEEDED: svrg_convergence_inner_strongly_convex expects fixed wTilde : E,
  -- but we have wTilde : Ω → E. This is a Level 2 gap requiring a bridge lemma.
  sorry

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 5: Outer-Loop Convergence Theorem
-- ============================================================================

/-- SVRG outer-loop convergence theorem (strongly convex case).

Archetype: B — epoch telescoping via induction on K.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, main convergence theorem) -/
theorem svrgOuter_convergence_strongly_convex
    (f : E → ℝ) {L : NNReal} {μ σ_eff η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    (hgrad : IsGradientOf f setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF)
    (hsmooth : IsLSmooth setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF L)
    (hsc : StrongConvexOn Set.univ μ f)
    (hmin : IsMinimizer f wStar)
    (hμ_pos : 0 < μ) (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hημ : η * μ < 1)
    (hη : ∀ t, setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.η t = η)
    (m : ℕ) (hm : 0 < m)
    (hvar_svrg : ∀ w wTilde, ∫ s, ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgOracle wTilde
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde) w s‖ ^ 2
        ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist ≤
        4 * (L : ℝ) * (f w - f wStar) +
          2 * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde -
            setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wStar‖ ^ 2)
    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_virtual : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)
          (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)) m ω - wStar‖ ^ 2)
        setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (h_intL_base : ∀ w, Integrable (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL w)
        setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist)
    (K : ℕ) :
    ∫ ω, ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m K ω - wStar‖ ^ 2
        ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
      (1 - η * μ) ^ (m * K) * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 +
        σ_eff ^ 2 / (m * μ ^ 2) := by
  induction K with
  | zero =>
      -- Base case: K=0, process = w₀

variable {E : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]

/-- Bridge lemma: apply inner-loop convergence when snapshot is a random variable.

theorem svrg_epoch_bridge
    (setup : SVRGSetup E S Ω) (f : E → ℝ) {L : NNReal} {μ σ_eff η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    (wTilde_fun : Ω → E) (hwTilde_meas : Measurable wTilde_fun)
    (hgrad : IsGradientOf f setup.toSGDSetup.gradF)

    (hη : ∀ t, setup.toSGDSetup.η t = η)
    (m : ℕ) (hm : 0 < m)

        ‖setup.svrgProcess (wTilde_fun ω) (setup.toSGDSetup.gradF (wTilde_fun ω)) m ω - wStar‖ ^ 2)
        setup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (h_intL_base : ∀ w, Integrable (setup.toSGDSetup.gradL w) setup.sampleDist) :
    ∫ ω, ‖setup.svrgProcess (wTilde_fun ω) (setup.toSGDSetup.gradF (wTilde_fun ω)) m ω - wStar‖ ^ 2
        ∂setup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
      (1 - η * μ) ^ m * ∫ ω, ‖wTilde_fun ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSGDSetup.P + η * σ_eff ^ 2 / μ := by
  sorry
""")

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 1: SVRG Outer-Loop Setup Structure

/-- SVRG outer-loop setup: extends `SVRGSetup` with epoch-level parameters.

Archetype: B (macro-level epoch telescoping with periodic snapshot updates)

Fields:
* `toSVRGSetup` : base SVRG infrastructure (oracle, samples, step sizes)
* `m` : epoch length (inner steps per epoch)
* `hgradF_meas` : measurability of true gradient (Convention 2)
* `hgradF_lsmooth` : L-smoothness for variance reduction bound
* `hgradF_strongly_convex` : strong convexity for variance reduction bound -/
structure SVRGOuterSetup
    (E : Type*) [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
      [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E]
    (S : Type*) [MeasurableSpace S]
    (Ω : Type*) [MeasurableSpace Ω] where
  toSVRGSetup : SVRGSetup E S Ω
  m : ℕ
  hgradF_meas : Measurable toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF
  hgradF_lsmooth : IsLSmooth toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF ⟨1, by norm_num⟩
  hgradF_strongly_convex : StrongConvexOn Set.univ μ toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF

namespace SVRGOuterSetup

variable (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω)

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 2: Outer-Loop Process Definition
-- ============================================================================

/-- SVRG outer-loop process: epoch-level recursion where each epoch runs `m` inner steps.

Update rule: `w_{k+1} = svrgProcess w_k (gradF w_k) m`
where snapshot `wTilde = w_k` (epoch start point) and `gradLTilde = gradF w_k`.

Archetype: B (macro) — snapshot updates every epoch, requires explicit telescoping.
Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, main convergence theorem) -/

  | _, 0 => fun _ => setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀

      let w_k := setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω

    (hsc : StrongConvexOn Set.univ μ f)
    (hmin : IsMinimizer f wStar)
    (hμ_pos : 0 < μ) (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hημ : η * μ < 1)
    (hη : ∀ t, setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.η t = η)
    (m : ℕ) (hm : 0 < m)
    (hvar_svrg : ∀ w wTilde, ∫ s, ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgOracle wTilde
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde) w s‖ ^ 2
        ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist ≤
        4 * (L : ℝ) * (f w - f wStar) +
          2 * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde -
            setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wStar‖ ^ 2)
    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_virtual : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)
          (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)) m ω - wStar‖ ^ 2)
        setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (h_intL_base : ∀ w, Integrable (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL w)
        setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist)
    (K : ℕ) :
    ∫ ω, ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m K ω - wStar‖ ^ 2
        ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
      (1 - η * μ) ^ (m * K) * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 +
        σ_eff ^ 2 / (m * μ ^ 2) := by
  induction K with
  | zero =>
      -- Base case: K=0, process = w₀
      simp [svrgOuterProcess_zero]
      rw [integral_const, smul_eq_mul, probReal_univ, one_mul, pow_zero, one_mul]
      linarith [div_nonneg (mul_nonneg (le_of_lt hη_pos) (sq_nonneg σ_eff)) (le_of_lt hμ_pos)]
  | succ K ih =>
      -- Step case: apply epoch_contraction_lemma at epoch K
      sorry

end SVRGOuterSetup

import Algorithms.SVRG
import Lib.Glue.Measurable
import Lib.Glue.Probability

open MeasureTheory ProbabilityTheory
open scoped InnerProductSpace

variable {E : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
  [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E] [SecondCountableTopology E]
variable {S : Type*} [MeasurableSpace S]
variable {Ω : Type*} [MeasurableSpace Ω]

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 1: SVRG Outer-Loop Setup Structure
-- ============================================================================

/-- SVRG outer-loop setup: extends `SVRGSetup` with epoch-level parameters.

Archetype: B (macro-level epoch telescoping with periodic snapshot updates)

Fields:
* `toSVRGSetup` : base SVRG infrastructure (oracle, samples, step sizes)
* `m` : epoch length (inner steps per epoch)
* `hgradF_meas` : measurability of true gradient (Convention 2)
* `hgradF_lsmooth` : L-smoothness for variance reduction bound
* `hgradF_strongly_convex` : strong convexity for variance reduction bound -/
structure SVRGOuterSetup
    (E : Type*) [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
      [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E]
    (S : Type*) [MeasurableSpace S]
    (Ω : Type*) [MeasurableSpace Ω] where
  toSVRGSetup : SVRGSetup E S Ω
  m : ℕ
  hgradF_meas : Measurable toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF
  hgradF_lsmooth : IsLSmooth toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF ⟨1, by norm_num⟩
  hgradF_strongly_convex : StrongConvexOn Set.univ μ toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF

namespace SVRGOuterSetup

variable (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω)

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 2: Outer-Loop Process Definition
-- ============================================================================

/-- SVRG outer-loop process: epoch-level recursion where each epoch runs `m` inner steps.

Update rule: `w_{k+1} = svrgProcess w_k (gradF w_k) m`
where snapshot `wTilde = w_k` (epoch start point) and `gradLTilde = gradF w_k`.

Archetype: B (macro) — snapshot updates every epoch, requires explicit telescoping.
Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, main convergence theorem) -/
noncomputable def svrgOuterProcess : ℕ → ℕ → Ω → E
  | _, 0 => fun _ => setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀
  | m, k + 1 => fun ω =>
      let w_k := setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω
      setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess w_k (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF w_k) m ω

omit [SecondCountableTopology E] in
@[simp] theorem svrgOuterProcess_zero (m : ℕ) :
    setup.svrgOuterProcess m 0 = fun _ => setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ := rfl

omit [SecondCountableTopology E] in
@[simp] theorem svrgOuterProcess_succ (m : ℕ) (k : ℕ) :
    setup.svrgOuterProcess m (k + 1) = fun ω =>
      setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)) m ω := rfl

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 3: Measurability Infrastructure
-- ============================================================================

/-- Measurability of outer-loop iterates.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, integrability hypotheses) -/
theorem svrgOuterProcess_measurable (m k : ℕ) :
    Measurable (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k) := by
  induction k with
  | zero => exact measurable_const
  | succ k ih =>
      simp only [svrgOuterProcess]
      -- svrgProcess is measurable when snapshot and gradLTilde are measurable
      have h1 : Measurable (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF ∘ setup.svrgOuterProcess m k) :=
        setup.hgradF_meas.comp ih
      have h2 : Measurable (setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k)
          (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF ∘ setup.svrgOuterProcess m k) m) := by
        -- svrgProcess_measurable requires measurable snapshot and gradLTilde
        simpa [Function.comp] using
          setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess_measurable
            (wTilde := setup.svrgOuterProcess m k)
            (gradLTilde := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF ∘ setup.svrgOuterProcess m k)
            (hgL := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.measurable_svrgOracle
              (wTilde := setup.svrgOuterProcess m k)
              (gradLTilde := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF ∘ setup.svrgOuterProcess m k)
              (by sorry)) -- TODO: need joint measurability of gradF ∘ process
      exact h2

/-- Adaptedness of outer-loop process to `sgdFiltration`.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, independence proof) -/
theorem svrgOuterProcess_adapted (m : ℕ) :
    Adapted (sgdFiltration setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.ξ
      setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.hξ_meas) (setup.svrgOuterProcess m) := by
  intro k
  induction k with
  | zero => exact measurable_const
  | succ k ih =>
      simp only [svrgOuterProcess]
      -- Similar structure to svrgProcess_adapted
      sorry

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 4: Epoch Contraction Lemma
-- ============================================================================

/-- Epoch contraction lemma for SVRG outer loop.

Archetype: B — requires dual integrability hypotheses (`h_int_norm_sq` + `h_int_virtual`)
per GLUE_TRICKS.md Section 4b.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, epoch telescoping base) -/
theorem epoch_contraction_lemma
    (f : E → ℝ) {L : NNReal} {μ σ_eff η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    (hgrad : IsGradientOf f setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF)
    (hsmooth : IsLSmooth setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF L)
    (hsc : StrongConvexOn Set.univ μ f)
    (hmin : IsMinimizer f wStar)
    (hμ_pos : 0 < μ) (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hημ : η * μ < 1)
    (hη : ∀ t, setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.η t = η)
    (m : ℕ) (hm : 0 < m)
    (hvar_svrg : ∀ w wTilde, ∫ s, ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgOracle wTilde
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde) w s‖ ^ 2
        ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist ≤
        4 * (L : ℝ) * (f w - f wStar) +
          2 * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde -
            setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wStar‖ ^ 2)
    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_virtual : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)
          (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)) m ω - wStar‖ ^ 2)
        setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (h_intL_base : ∀ w, Integrable (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL w)
        setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist)
    (k : ℕ) :
    ∫ ω, ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m (k + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2
        ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
      (1 - η * μ) ^ m * ∫ ω, ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2
        ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P + η * σ_eff ^ 2 / μ := by
  haveI := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.hP
  -- Step 1: Unfold svrgOuterProcess_succ to expose svrgProcess
  have h_unfold : setup.svrgOuterProcess m (k + 1) = fun ω =>
      setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)) m ω :=
    rfl
  rw [h_unfold]
  -- Step 2: Apply inner-loop convergence theorem
  -- svrg_convergence_inner_strongly_convex with:
  --   wTilde := setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω (random variable, not fixed!)
  --   gradLTilde := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde
  -- BRIDGE NEEDED: svrg_convergence_inner_strongly_convex expects fixed wTilde : E,
  -- but we have wTilde : Ω → E. This is a Level 2 gap requiring a bridge lemma.
  sorry

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 5: Outer-Loop Convergence Theorem
-- ============================================================================

/-- SVRG outer-loop convergence theorem (strongly convex case).

Archetype: B — epoch telescoping via induction on K.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, main convergence theorem) -/
theorem svrgOuter_convergence_strongly_convex
    (f : E → ℝ) {L : NNReal} {μ σ_eff η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    (hgrad : IsGradientOf f setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF)
    (hsmooth : IsLSmooth setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF L)
    (hsc : StrongConvexOn Set.univ μ f)
    (hmin : IsMinimizer f wStar)
    (hμ_pos : 0 < μ) (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hημ : η * μ < 1)
    (hη : ∀ t, setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.η t = η)
    (m : ℕ) (hm : 0 < m)
    (hvar_svrg : ∀ w wTilde, ∫ s, ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgOracle wTilde
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde) w s‖ ^ 2
        ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist ≤
        4 * (L : ℝ) * (f w - f wStar) +
          2 * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde -
            setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wStar‖ ^ 2)
    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_virtual : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)
          (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)) m ω - wStar‖ ^ 2)
        setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (h_intL_base : ∀ w, Integrable (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL w)
        setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist)
    (K : ℕ) :
    ∫ ω, ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m K ω - wStar‖ ^ 2
        ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
      (1 - η * μ) ^ (m * K) * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 +
        σ_eff ^ 2 / (m * μ ^ 2) := by
  induction K with
  | zero =>
      -- Base case: K=0, process = w₀
      simp [svrgOuterProcess_zero]
      rw [integral_const, smul_eq_mul, probReal_univ, one_mul, pow_zero, one_mul]
      linarith [div_nonneg (mul_nonneg (le_of_lt hη_pos) (sq_nonneg σ_eff)) (le_of_lt hμ_pos)]
  | succ K ih =>
      -- Step case: apply epoch_contraction_lemma at epoch K
      sorry

end SVRGOuterSetup
