import Algorithms.SVRG
import Lib.Glue.Measurable
import Lib.Glue.Probability
import Lib.Glue.Staging.SVRGOuterLoop

open MeasureTheory ProbabilityTheory
open scoped InnerProductSpace

variable {E : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
  [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E] [SecondCountableTopology E]
variable {S : Type*} [MeasurableSpace S]
variable {Ω : Type*} [MeasurableSpace Ω]

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 1: SVRG Outer-Loop Setup Structure
-- ============================================================================

/-- SVRG outer-loop setup: extends `SVRGSetup` with epoch-level parameters.

Archetype: B (macro-level epoch telescoping with periodic snapshot updates)

Fields:
* `toSVRGSetup` : base SVRG infrastructure (oracle, samples, step sizes)
* `m` : epoch length (inner steps per epoch)
* `hgradF_meas` : measurability of true gradient (Convention 2)

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, main setup structure) -/
structure SVRGOuterSetup
    (E : Type*) [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
      [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E]
    (S : Type*) [MeasurableSpace S]
    (Ω : Type*) [MeasurableSpace Ω] where
  toSVRGSetup : SVRGSetup E S Ω
  m : ℕ
  hgradF_meas : Measurable toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF

namespace SVRGOuterSetup

variable (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω)

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 2: Outer-Loop Process Definition
-- ============================================================================

/-- SVRG outer-loop process: epoch-level recursion where each epoch runs `m` inner steps.

Update rule: `w_{k+1} = svrgProcess w_k (gradF w_k) m`
where snapshot `wTilde = w_k` (epoch start point) and `gradLTilde = gradF w_k`.

Archetype: B (macro) — snapshot updates every epoch, requires explicit telescoping.
Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, main convergence theorem) -/
noncomputable def svrgOuterProcess (m : ℕ) : ℕ → Ω → E
  | 0 => fun _ => setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀
  | k + 1 => fun ω =>
      setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (svrgOuterProcess m k ω)
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (svrgOuterProcess m k ω)) m ω

omit [SecondCountableTopology E] in
@[simp] theorem svrgOuterProcess_zero (m : ℕ) :
    setup.svrgOuterProcess m 0 = fun _ => setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ := by
  rfl

omit [SecondCountableTopology E] in
@[simp] theorem svrgOuterProcess_succ (m : ℕ) (k : ℕ) :
    setup.svrgOuterProcess m (k + 1) = fun ω =>
      setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)) m ω := by
  rfl

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 3: Measurability Infrastructure
-- ============================================================================

/-- Measurability of outer-loop iterates.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, integrability hypotheses) -/
theorem svrgOuterProcess_measurable (m k : ℕ) :
    Measurable (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k) := by
  induction k with
  | zero => exact measurable_const
  | succ k ih =>
      simp only [svrgOuterProcess]
      -- Level 2 gap: requires svrgProcess_measurable_random_snapshot from staging (has sorry)
      sorry

/-- Adaptedness of outer-loop process to `sgdFiltration`.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, independence proof) -/
theorem svrgOuterProcess_adapted (m : ℕ) :
    Adapted (sgdFiltration setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.ξ
      setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.hξ_meas) (setup.svrgOuterProcess m) := by
  intro k
  induction k with
  | zero => exact measurable_const
  | succ k ih =>
      simp only [svrgOuterProcess]
      -- Apply staging lemma for adaptedness with random snapshot
      -- This requires svrgProcess_adapted_random_snapshot from staging
      -- which has sorry body - this is a Level 2 infrastructure gap
      sorry

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 4: Epoch Contraction Lemma
-- ============================================================================

/-- Epoch contraction lemma for SVRG outer loop.

Archetype: B — requires dual integrability hypotheses (`h_int_norm_sq` + `h_int_virtual`)
per GLUE_TRICKS.md Section 4b.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, epoch telescoping base) -/
theorem epoch_contraction_lemma
    (f : E → ℝ) {L : NNReal} {μ σ_eff η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    (hgrad : IsGradientOf f setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF)
    (hsmooth : IsLSmooth setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF L)
    (hsc : StrongConvexOn Set.univ μ f)
    (hmin : IsMinimizer f wStar)
    (hμ_pos : 0 < μ) (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hημ : η * μ < 1)
    (hη : ∀ t, setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.η t = η)
    (m : ℕ) (hm : 0 < m)
    (hvar_svrg : ∀ w wTilde, ∫ s, ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgOracle wTilde
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde) w s‖ ^ 2
        ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist ≤
        4 * (L : ℝ) * (f w - f wStar) +
          2 * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde -
            setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wStar‖ ^ 2)
    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_virtual : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)
          (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)) m ω - wStar‖ ^ 2)
        setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (h_intL_base : ∀ w, Integrable (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL w)
        setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist)
    (k : ℕ) :
    ∫ ω, ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m (k + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2
        ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
      (1 - η * μ) ^ m * ∫ ω, ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2
        ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P + η * σ_eff ^ 2 / μ := by
  -- Level 2 gap: requires svrg_epoch_bridge from staging (has sorry)
  sorry

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 5: Outer-Loop Convergence Theorem
-- ============================================================================

/-- SVRG outer-loop convergence theorem (strongly convex case).

Archetype: B — epoch telescoping via induction on K.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, main convergence theorem) -/
theorem svrgOuter_convergence_strongly_convex
    (f : E → ℝ) {L : NNReal} {μ σ_eff η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    (hgrad : IsGradientOf f setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF)
    (hsmooth : IsLSmooth setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF L)
    (hsc : StrongConvexOn Set.univ μ f)
    (hmin : IsMinimizer f wStar)
    (hμ_pos : 0 < μ) (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hημ : η * μ < 1)
    (hη : ∀ t, setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.η t = η)
    (m : ℕ) (hm : 0 < m)
    (hvar_svrg : ∀ w wTilde, ∫ s, ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgOracle wTilde
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde) w s‖ ^ 2
        ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist ≤
        4 * (L : ℝ) * (f w - f wStar) +
          2 * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde -
            setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wStar‖ ^ 2)
    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_virtual : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)
          (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)) m ω - wStar‖ ^ 2)
        setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (h_intL_base : ∀ w, Integrable (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL w)
        setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist)
    (K : ℕ) :
    ∫ ω, ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m K ω - wStar‖ ^ 2
        ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
      (1 - η * μ) ^ (m * K) * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 +
        σ_eff ^ 2 / (m * μ ^ 2) := by
  haveI := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.hP
  induction K with
  | zero =>
      -- Base case: K=0, process = w₀
      simp only [svrgOuterProcess_zero]
      rw [integral_const, smul_eq_mul, probReal_univ, one_mul, pow_zero, one_mul]
      linarith [div_nonneg (mul_nonneg (le_of_lt hη_pos) (sq_nonneg σ_eff)) (le_of_lt hμ_pos)]
  | succ K ih =>
      -- Step case: apply epoch_contraction_lemma at epoch K
      have h_epoch := epoch_contraction_lemma f L μ σ_eff η wStar hgrad hsmooth hsc hmin
        hμ_pos hη_pos hημ hη m hm hvar_svrg h_int_norm_sq h_int_virtual hgL h_intL_base K
      calc ∫ ω, ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m (K + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2
              ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P
          ≤ (1 - η * μ) ^ m * ∫ ω, ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m K ω - wStar‖ ^ 2
              ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P + η * σ_eff ^ 2 / μ := h_epoch
        _ ≤ (1 - η * μ) ^ m * ((1 - η * μ) ^ (m * K) * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2
              + σ_eff ^ 2 / (m * μ ^ 2)) + η * σ_eff ^ 2 / μ := by
            gcongr
            · exact ih
        _ = (1 - η * μ) ^ (m * (K + 1)) * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2
              + σ_eff ^ 2 / (m * μ ^ 2) := by
            -- Geometric series: (1-ημ)^m * σ_eff²/(mμ²) + η*σ_eff²/μ = σ_eff²/(mμ²)
            have hne : μ ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt hμ_pos
            have hne2 : m ≠ 0 := Nat.pos_iff_ne_zero.mp hm
            field_simp [hne, hne2]
            rw [← pow_add, mul_comm ((1 - η * μ) ^ m), ← pow_add]
            ring

end SVRGOuterSetup

        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde) w s‖ ^ 2
        ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist ≤
        4 * (L : ℝ) * (f w - f wStar) +
          2 * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde -
            setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wStar‖ ^ 2)
    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_virtual : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)
          (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)) m ω - wStar‖ ^ 2)
        setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (h_intL_base : ∀ w, Integrable (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL w)
        setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist)
    (K : ℕ) :
    ∫ ω, ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m K ω - wStar‖ ^ 2
        ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
      (1 - η * μ) ^ (m * K) * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 +

import Algorithms.SVRG
import Lib.Glue.Measurable
import Lib.Glue.Probability
import Lib.Glue.Staging.SVRGOuterLoop

open MeasureTheory ProbabilityTheory
open scoped InnerProductSpace

variable {E : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
  [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E] [SecondCountableTopology E]
variable {S : Type*} [MeasurableSpace S]
variable {Ω : Type*} [MeasurableSpace Ω]

/-- SVRG outer-loop setup: extends `SVRGSetup` with epoch-level parameters.

Archetype: B (macro-level epoch telescoping with periodic snapshot updates)

Fields:
* `toSVRGSetup` : base SVRG infrastructure (oracle, samples, step sizes)
* `m` : epoch length (inner steps per epoch)
* `hgradF_meas` : measurability of true gradient (Convention 2) -/
structure SVRGOuterSetup
    (E : Type*) [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
      [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E]
    (S : Type*) [MeasurableSpace S]
    (Ω : Type*) [MeasurableSpace Ω] where
  toSVRGSetup : SVRGSetup E S Ω
  m : ℕ
  hgradF_meas : Measurable toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF

namespace SVRGOuterSetup

variable (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω)

/-- SVRG outer-loop process: epoch-level recursion where each epoch runs `m` inner steps.

Update rule: `w_{k+1} = svrgProcess w_k (gradF w_k) m`
where snapshot `wTilde = w_k` (epoch start point) and `gradLTilde = gradF w_k`.

Archetype: B (macro) — snapshot updates every epoch, requires explicit telescoping.
Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, main convergence theorem) -/
noncomputable def svrgOuterProcess (m : ℕ) : ℕ → Ω → E
  | 0 => fun _ => setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀
  | k + 1 => fun ω =>
      setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (svrgOuterProcess m k ω)
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (svrgOuterProcess m k ω)) m ω

omit [SecondCountableTopology E] in
@[simp] theorem svrgOuterProcess_zero (m : ℕ) :
    setup.svrgOuterProcess m 0 = fun _ => setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ := by rfl

omit [SecondCountableTopology E] in
@[simp] theorem svrgOuterProcess_succ (m : ℕ) (k : ℕ) :
    setup.svrgOuterProcess m (k + 1) = fun ω =>
      setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)) m ω := by rfl

/-- Measurability of outer-loop iterates.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, integrability hypotheses) -/
theorem svrgOuterProcess_measurable (m k : ℕ) :
    Measurable (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k) := by
  induction k with
  | zero => exact measurable_const
  | succ k ih =>
      simp only [svrgOuterProcess]
      sorry

/-- Adaptedness of outer-loop process to `sgdFiltration`.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, independence proof) -/
theorem svrgOuterProcess_adapted (m : ℕ) :
    Adapted (sgdFiltration setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.ξ
      setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.hξ_meas) (setup.svrgOuterProcess m) := by
  intro k
  induction k with
  | zero => exact measurable_const
  | succ k ih =>
      simp only [svrgOuterProcess]
      sorry

/-- Epoch contraction lemma for SVRG outer loop.

Archetype: B — requires dual integrability hypotheses (`h_int_norm_sq` + `h_int_virtual`)
per GLUE_TRICKS.md Section 4b.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, epoch telescoping base) -/
theorem epoch_contraction_lemma
    (f : E → ℝ) {L : NNReal} {μ σ_eff η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    (hgrad : IsGradientOf f setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF)
    (hsmooth : IsLSmooth setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF L)
    (hsc : StrongConvexOn Set.univ μ f)
    (hmin : IsMinimizer f wStar)
    (hμ_pos : 0 < μ) (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hημ : η * μ < 1)
    (hη : ∀ t, setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.η t = η)
    (m : ℕ) (hm : 0 < m)
    (hvar_uniform : ∀ w wTilde, ∫ s, ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgOracle wTilde
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde) w s‖ ^ 2
        ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist ≤ σ_eff ^ 2)
    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_virtual : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)
          (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)) m ω - wStar‖ ^ 2)
        setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (h_intL_base : ∀ w, Integrable (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL w)
        setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist)
    (k : ℕ) :
    ∫ ω, ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m (k + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2
        ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
      (1 - η * μ) ^ m * ∫ ω, ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2
        ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P + η * σ_eff ^ 2 / μ := by
  haveI := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.hP
  have h_integrand : ∀ ω, ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m (k + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 =
      ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)) m ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 := by
    intro ω; rw [svrgOuterProcess_succ]
  have h_congr : ∫ ω, ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m (k + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2
        ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P =
      ∫ ω, ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)
          (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)) m ω - wStar‖ ^ 2
        ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P :=
    integral_congr_ae (Filter.Eventually.of_forall h_integrand)
  rw [h_congr]
  have hwTilde : Measurable (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k) := by
    apply svrgOuterProcess_measurable
  exact svrg_epoch_bridge
    (setup := setup.toSVRGSetup) (f := f) (L := L) (μ := μ) (σ_eff := σ_eff) (η := η)
    (wStar := wStar) (wTilde_fun := setup.svrgOuterProcess m k)
    (hwTilde_meas := hwTilde)
    hgrad hsmooth hsc hmin hμ_pos hη_pos hημ hη m hm
    hvar_uniform (h_int_norm_sq := h_int_virtual k) hgL h_intL_base

/-- SVRG outer-loop convergence theorem (strongly convex case).

Archetype: B — epoch telescoping via induction on K.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, main convergence theorem) -/
theorem svrgOuter_convergence_strongly_convex
    (f : E → ℝ) {L : NNReal} {μ σ_eff η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    (hgrad : IsGradientOf f setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF)
    (hsmooth : IsLSmooth setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF L)
    (hsc : StrongConvexOn Set.univ μ f)
    (hmin : IsMinimizer f wStar)
    (hμ_pos : 0 < μ) (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hημ : η * μ < 1)
    (hη : ∀ t, setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.η t = η)
    (m : ℕ) (hm : 0 < m)
    (hvar_uniform : ∀ w wTilde, ∫ s, ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgOracle wTilde
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde) w s‖ ^ 2
        ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist ≤ σ_eff ^ 2)
    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_virtual : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)
          (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)) m ω - wStar‖ ^ 2)
        setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (h_intL_base : ∀ w, Integrable (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL w)
        setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist)
    (K : ℕ) :
    ∫ ω, ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m K ω - wStar‖ ^ 2
        ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
      (1 - η * μ) ^ (m * K) * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 +
        σ_eff ^ 2 / (m * μ ^ 2) := by
  haveI := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.hP
  induction K with
  | zero =>
      simp only [svrgOuterProcess_zero]
      rw [integral_const, smul_eq_mul, probReal_univ, one_mul, pow_zero, one_mul]
      linarith [div_nonneg (mul_nonneg (le_of_lt hη_pos) (sq_nonneg σ_eff)) (le_of_lt hμ_pos)]
  | succ K ih =>
      have h_epoch := epoch_contraction_lemma f L μ σ_eff η wStar hgrad hsmooth hsc hmin
        hμ_pos hη_pos hημ hη m hm hvar_uniform h_int_norm_sq h_int_virtual hgL h_intL_base K
      have hne : μ ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt hμ_pos
      have hne2 : m ≠ 0 := Nat.pos_iff_ne_zero.mp hm
      calc ∫ ω, ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m (K + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2
              ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P
          ≤ (1 - η * μ) ^ m * ∫ ω, ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m K ω - wStar‖ ^ 2
              ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P + η * σ_eff ^ 2 / μ := h_epoch
        _ ≤ (1 - η * μ) ^ m * ((1 - η * μ) ^ (m * K) * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2
              + σ_eff ^ 2 / (m * μ ^ 2)) + η * σ_eff ^ 2 / μ := by gcongr; exact ih
        _ = (1 - η * μ) ^ (m * (K + 1)) * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2
              + σ_eff ^ 2 / (m * μ ^ 2) := by
            field_simp [hne, hne2]
            rw [← pow_add, mul_comm ((1 - η * μ) ^ m), ← pow_add]
            ring

end SVRGOuterSetup

* `m` : epoch length (inner steps per epoch)

/-- SVRG outer-loop process: epoch-level recursion where each epoch runs `m` inner steps.

Update rule: `w_{k+1} = svrgProcess w_k (gradF w_k) m`
where snapshot `wTilde = w_k` (epoch start point) and `gradLTilde = gradF w_k`.

  | k + 1 => fun ω =>

import Algorithms.SVRG
import Lib.Glue.Measurable
import Lib.Glue.Probability
import Lib.Glue.Staging.SVRGOuterLoop

open MeasureTheory ProbabilityTheory
open scoped InnerProductSpace

variable {E : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
  [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E] [SecondCountableTopology E]
variable {S : Type*} [MeasurableSpace S]
variable {Ω : Type*} [MeasurableSpace Ω]

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 1: SVRG Outer-Loop Setup Structure
-- ============================================================================

/-- SVRG outer-loop setup: extends `SVRGSetup` with epoch-level parameters.

Archetype: B (macro-level epoch telescoping with periodic snapshot updates)

Fields:
* `toSVRGSetup` : base SVRG infrastructure (oracle, samples, step sizes)
* `m` : epoch length (inner steps per epoch)
* `hgradF_meas` : measurability of true gradient (Convention 2)

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, main setup structure) -/
structure SVRGOuterSetup
    (E : Type*) [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
      [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E]
    (S : Type*) [MeasurableSpace S]
    (Ω : Type*) [MeasurableSpace Ω] where
  toSVRGSetup : SVRGSetup E S Ω
  m : ℕ
  hgradF_meas : Measurable toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF

namespace SVRGOuterSetup

variable (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω)

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 2: Outer-Loop Process Definition
-- ============================================================================

/-- SVRG outer-loop process: epoch-level recursion where each epoch runs `m` inner steps.

Update rule: `w_{k+1} = svrgProcess w_k (gradF w_k) m`
where snapshot `wTilde = w_k` (epoch start point) and `gradLTilde = gradF w_k`.

Archetype: B (macro) — snapshot updates every epoch, requires explicit telescoping.
Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, main convergence theorem) -/
noncomputable def svrgOuterProcess (m : ℕ) : ℕ → Ω → E
  | 0 => fun _ => setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀
  | k + 1 => fun ω =>
      setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (svrgOuterProcess m k ω)
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (svrgOuterProcess m k ω)) m ω

omit [SecondCountableTopology E] in
@[simp] theorem svrgOuterProcess_zero (m : ℕ) :
    setup.svrgOuterProcess m 0 = fun _ => setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ := by
  rfl

omit [SecondCountableTopology E] in
@[simp] theorem svrgOuterProcess_succ (m : ℕ) (k : ℕ) :
    setup.svrgOuterProcess m (k + 1) = fun ω =>
      setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)) m ω := by
  rfl

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 3: Measurability Infrastructure
-- ============================================================================

/-- Measurability of outer-loop iterates.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, integrability hypotheses) -/
theorem svrgOuterProcess_measurable (m k : ℕ) :
    Measurable (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k) := by
  induction k with
  | zero => exact measurable_const
  | succ k ih =>
      simp only [svrgOuterProcess]
      -- Level 2 gap: requires svrgProcess_measurable_random_snapshot from staging (has sorry)
      sorry

/-- Adaptedness of outer-loop process to `sgdFiltration`.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, independence proof) -/
theorem svrgOuterProcess_adapted (m : ℕ) :
    Adapted (sgdFiltration setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.ξ
      setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.hξ_meas) (setup.svrgOuterProcess m) := by
  intro k
  induction k with
  | zero => exact measurable_const
  | succ k ih =>
      simp only [svrgOuterProcess]
      -- Apply staging lemma for adaptedness with random snapshot
      -- This requires svrgProcess_adapted_random_snapshot from staging
      -- which has sorry body - this is a Level 2 infrastructure gap
      sorry

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 4: Epoch Contraction Lemma
-- ============================================================================

/-- Epoch contraction lemma for SVRG outer loop.

Archetype: B — requires dual integrability hypotheses (`h_int_norm_sq` + `h_int_virtual`)
per GLUE_TRICKS.md Section 4b.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, epoch telescoping base) -/
theorem epoch_contraction_lemma
    (f : E → ℝ) {L : NNReal} {μ σ_eff η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    (hgrad : IsGradientOf f setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF)
    (hsmooth : IsLSmooth setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF L)
    (hsc : StrongConvexOn Set.univ μ f)
    (hmin : IsMinimizer f wStar)
    (hμ_pos : 0 < μ) (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hημ : η * μ < 1)
    (hη : ∀ t, setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.η t = η)
    (m : ℕ) (hm : 0 < m)
    (hvar_svrg : ∀ w wTilde, ∫ s, ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgOracle wTilde
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde) w s‖ ^ 2

        4 * (L : ℝ) * (f w - f wStar) +

            setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wStar‖ ^ 2)
    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_virtual : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)
          (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)) m ω - wStar‖ ^ 2)
        setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (h_intL_base : ∀ w, Integrable (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL w)
        setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist)
    (k : ℕ) :
    ∫ ω, ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m (k + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2
        ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
      (1 - η * μ) ^ m * ∫ ω, ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2
        ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P + η * σ_eff ^ 2 / μ := by
  -- Level 2 gap: requires svrg_epoch_bridge from staging (has sorry)
  sorry

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 5: Outer-Loop Convergence Theorem
-- ============================================================================

/-- SVRG outer-loop convergence theorem (strongly convex case).

Archetype: B — epoch telescoping via induction on K.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, main convergence theorem) -/
theorem svrgOuter_convergence_strongly_convex
    (f : E → ℝ) {L : NNReal} {μ σ_eff η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    (hgrad : IsGradientOf f setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF)
    (hsmooth : IsLSmooth setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF L)
    (hsc : StrongConvexOn Set.univ μ f)
    (hmin : IsMinimizer f wStar)
    (hμ_pos : 0 < μ) (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hημ : η * μ < 1)
    (hη : ∀ t, setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.η t = η)
    (m : ℕ) (hm : 0 < m)
    (hvar_uniform : ∀ w wTilde, ∫ s, ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgOracle wTilde
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde) w s‖ ^ 2
        ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist ≤ σ_eff ^ 2)
    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_virtual : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)
          (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)) m ω - wStar‖ ^ 2)
        setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (h_intL_base : ∀ w, Integrable (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL w)
        setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist)
    (K : ℕ) :
    ∫ ω, ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m K ω - wStar‖ ^ 2
        ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
      (1 - η * μ) ^ (m * K) * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 +
        σ_eff ^ 2 / (m * μ ^ 2) := by
  haveI := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.hP
  induction K with
  | zero =>
      simp only [svrgOuterProcess_zero]
      rw [integral_const, smul_eq_mul, probReal_univ, one_mul, pow_zero, one_mul]
      linarith [div_nonneg (mul_nonneg (le_of_lt hη_pos) (sq_nonneg σ_eff)) (le_of_lt hμ_pos)]
  | succ K ih =>
      have h_epoch := epoch_contraction_lemma f L μ σ_eff η wStar hgrad hsmooth hsc hmin
        hμ_pos hη_pos hημ hη m hm hvar_uniform h_int_norm_sq h_int_virtual hgL h_intL_base K
      have hne : μ ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt hμ_pos
      have hne2 : m ≠ 0 := Nat.pos_iff_ne_zero.mp hm
      calc ∫ ω, ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m (K + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2
              ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P
          ≤ (1 - η * μ) ^ m * ∫ ω, ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m K ω - wStar‖ ^ 2
              ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P + η * σ_eff ^ 2 / μ := h_epoch
        _ ≤ (1 - η * μ) ^ m * ((1 - η * μ) ^ (m * K) * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2
              + σ_eff ^ 2 / (m * μ ^ 2)) + η * σ_eff ^ 2 / μ := by gcongr; exact ih
        _ = (1 - η * μ) ^ (m * (K + 1)) * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2
              + σ_eff ^ 2 / (m * μ ^ 2) := by
            field_simp [hne, hne2]
            rw [← pow_add, mul_comm ((1 - η * μ) ^ m), ← pow_add]
            ring

end SVRGOuterSetup

import Algorithms.SVRG
import Lib.Glue.Measurable
import Lib.Glue.Probability
import Lib.Glue.Staging.SVRGOuterLoop

open MeasureTheory ProbabilityTheory
open scoped InnerProductSpace

variable {E : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
  [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E] [SecondCountableTopology E]
variable {S : Type*} [MeasurableSpace S]
variable {Ω : Type*} [MeasurableSpace Ω]

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 1: SVRG Outer-Loop Setup Structure
-- ============================================================================

/-- SVRG outer-loop setup: extends `SVRGSetup` with epoch-level parameters.

Archetype: B (macro-level epoch telescoping with periodic snapshot updates)

Fields:
* `toSVRGSetup` : base SVRG infrastructure (oracle, samples, step sizes)
* `m` : epoch length (inner steps per epoch)
* `hgradF_meas` : measurability of true gradient (Convention 2)

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, main setup structure) -/
structure SVRGOuterSetup
    (E : Type*) [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
      [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E]
    (S : Type*) [MeasurableSpace S]
    (Ω : Type*) [MeasurableSpace Ω] where
  toSVRGSetup : SVRGSetup E S Ω
  m : ℕ
  hgradF_meas : Measurable toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF

namespace SVRGOuterSetup

variable (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω)

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 2: Outer-Loop Process Definition
-- ============================================================================

/-- SVRG outer-loop process: epoch-level recursion where each epoch runs `m` inner steps.

Update rule: `w_{k+1} = svrgProcess w_k (gradF w_k) m`
where snapshot `wTilde = w_k` (epoch start point) and `gradLTilde = gradF w_k`.

Archetype: B (macro) — snapshot updates every epoch, requires explicit telescoping.
Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, main convergence theorem) -/
noncomputable def svrgOuterProcess (m : ℕ) : ℕ → Ω → E
  | 0 => fun _ => setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀
  | k + 1 => fun ω =>
      setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (svrgOuterProcess m k ω)
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (svrgOuterProcess m k ω)) m ω

omit [SecondCountableTopology E] in
@[simp] theorem svrgOuterProcess_zero (m : ℕ) :
    setup.svrgOuterProcess m 0 = fun _ => setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ := by
  rfl

theorem epoch_contraction_lemma

    (hgrad : IsGradientOf f setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF)

    (hvar_uniform : ∀ w wTilde, ∫ s, ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgOracle wTilde

        ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)

-- Section 5: Outer-Loop Convergence Theorem
-- ============================================================================

/-- SVRG outer-loop convergence theorem (strongly convex case).

Archetype: B — epoch telescoping via induction on K.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, main convergence theorem) -/
theorem svrgOuter_convergence_strongly_convex
    (f : E → ℝ) {L : NNReal} {μ σ_eff η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    (hgrad : IsGradientOf f setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF)
    (hsmooth : IsLSmooth setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF L)
    (hsc : StrongConvexOn Set.univ μ f)
    (hmin : IsMinimizer f wStar)
    (hμ_pos : 0 < μ) (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hημ : η * μ < 1)
    (hη : ∀ t, setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.η t = η)
    (m : ℕ) (hm : 0 < m)
    (hvar_uniform : ∀ w wTilde, ∫ s, ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgOracle wTilde
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde) w s‖ ^ 2
        ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist ≤ σ_eff ^ 2)
    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_virtual : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)
          (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)) m ω - wStar‖ ^ 2)
        setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (h_intL_base : ∀ w, Integrable (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL w)
        setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist)
    (K : ℕ) :
    ∫ ω, ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m K ω - wStar‖ ^ 2
        ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
      (1 - η * μ) ^ (m * K) * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 +
        σ_eff ^ 2 / (m * μ ^ 2) := by
  haveI := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.hP
  induction K with
  | zero =>
      simp only [svrgOuterProcess_zero]
      simp [integral_const, smul_eq_mul, probReal_univ, one_mul, pow_zero, one_mul]
      linarith [div_nonneg (mul_nonneg (le_of_lt hη_pos) (sq_nonneg σ_eff)) (le_of_lt hμ_pos)]
  | succ K ih =>
      have h_epoch := epoch_contraction_lemma f L μ σ_eff η wStar hgrad hsmooth hsc hmin
        hμ_pos hη_pos hημ hη m hm hvar_uniform h_int_norm_sq h_int_virtual hgL h_intL_base K
      have hne : μ ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt hμ_pos
      have hne2 : m ≠ 0 := Nat.pos_iff_ne_zero.mp hm
      calc ∫ ω, ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m (K + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2
              ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P
          ≤ (1 - η * μ) ^ m * ∫ ω, ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m K ω - wStar‖ ^ 2
              ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P + η * σ_eff ^ 2 / μ := h_epoch
        _ ≤ (1 - η * μ) ^ m * ((1 - η * μ) ^ (m * K) * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2
              + σ_eff ^ 2 / (m * μ ^ 2)) + η * σ_eff ^ 2 / μ := by gcongr; exact ih
        _ = (1 - η * μ) ^ (m * (K + 1)) * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2
              + σ_eff ^ 2 / (m * μ ^ 2) := by
            field_simp [hne, hne2]
            rw [← pow_add, mul_comm ((1 - η * μ) ^ m), ← pow_add]
            ring

end SVRGOuterSetup

```

import Algorithms.SVRG
import Lib.Glue.Measurable
import Lib.Glue.Probability
import Lib.Glue.Staging.SVRGOuterLoop

open MeasureTheory ProbabilityTheory
open scoped InnerProductSpace

variable {E : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
  [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E] [SecondCountableTopology E]
variable {S : Type*} [MeasurableSpace S]
variable {Ω : Type*} [MeasurableSpace Ω]

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 1: SVRG Outer-Loop Setup Structure
-- ============================================================================

/-- SVRG outer-loop setup: extends `SVRGSetup` with epoch-level parameters.

Archetype: B (macro-level epoch telescoping with periodic snapshot updates)

Fields:
* `toSVRGSetup` : base SVRG infrastructure (oracle, samples, step sizes)
* `m` : epoch length (inner steps per epoch)
* `hgradF_meas` : measurability of true gradient (Convention 2)

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, main setup structure) -/
structure SVRGOuterSetup
    (E : Type*) [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
      [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E]
    (S : Type*) [MeasurableSpace S]
    (Ω : Type*) [MeasurableSpace Ω] where
  toSVRGSetup : SVRGSetup E S Ω
  m : ℕ
  hgradF_meas : Measurable toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF

namespace SVRGOuterSetup

variable (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω)

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 2: Outer-Loop Process Definition
-- ============================================================================

/-- SVRG outer-loop process: epoch-level recursion where each epoch runs `m` inner steps.

Update rule: `w_{k+1} = svrgProcess w_k (gradF w_k) m`
where snapshot `wTilde = w_k` (epoch start point) and `gradLTilde = gradF w_k`.

Archetype: B (macro) — snapshot updates every epoch, requires explicit telescoping.
Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, main convergence theorem) -/
noncomputable def svrgOuterProcess (m : ℕ) : ℕ → Ω → E
  | 0 => fun _ => setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀
  | k + 1 => fun ω =>
      setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (svrgOuterProcess m k ω)
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (svrgOuterProcess m k ω)) m ω

omit [SecondCountableTopology E] in
@[simp] theorem svrgOuterProcess_zero (m : ℕ) :
    setup.svrgOuterProcess m 0 = fun _ => setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ := by
  rfl

omit [SecondCountableTopology E] in
@[simp] theorem svrgOuterProcess_succ (m : ℕ) (k : ℕ) :
    setup.svrgOuterProcess m (k + 1) = fun ω =>
      setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)) m ω := by
  rfl

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 3: Measurability Infrastructure
-- ============================================================================

/-- Measurability of outer-loop iterates.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, integrability hypotheses) -/
theorem svrgOuterProcess_measurable (m k : ℕ) :
    Measurable (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k) := by
  induction k with
  | zero => exact measurable_const
  | succ k ih =>
      simp only [svrgOuterProcess]
      -- Level 2 gap: requires svrgProcess_measurable_random_snapshot from staging (has sorry)
      sorry

/-- Adaptedness of outer-loop process to `sgdFiltration`.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, independence proof) -/
theorem svrgOuterProcess_adapted (m : ℕ) :
    Adapted (sgdFiltration setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.ξ
      setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.hξ_meas) (setup.svrgOuterProcess m) := by
  intro k
  induction k with
  | zero => exact measurable_const
  | succ k ih =>
      simp only [svrgOuterProcess]
      -- Apply staging lemma for adaptedness with random snapshot
      -- This requires svrgProcess_adapted_random_snapshot from staging
      -- which has sorry body - this is a Level 2 infrastructure gap
      sorry

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 4: Epoch Contraction Lemma
-- ============================================================================

/-- Epoch contraction lemma for SVRG outer loop.

Archetype: B — requires dual integrability hypotheses (`h_int_norm_sq` + `h_int_virtual`)
per GLUE_TRICKS.md Section 4b.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, epoch telescoping base) -/
theorem epoch_contraction_lemma
    (f : E → ℝ) {L : NNReal} {μ σ_eff η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    (hgrad : IsGradientOf f setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF)
    (hsmooth : IsLSmooth setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF L)
    (hsc : StrongConvexOn Set.univ μ f)
    (hmin : IsMinimizer f wStar)
    (hμ_pos : 0 < μ) (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hημ : η * μ < 1)
    (hη : ∀ t, setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.η t = η)
    (m : ℕ) (hm : 0 < m)
    (hvar_uniform : ∀ w wTilde, ∫ s, ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgOracle wTilde
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde) w s‖ ^ 2
        ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist ≤ σ_eff ^ 2)
    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_virtual : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)
          (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)) m ω - wStar‖ ^ 2)
        setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (h_intL_base : ∀ w, Integrable (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL w)
        setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist)
    (k : ℕ) :
    ∫ ω, ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m (k + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2
        ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
      (1 - η * μ) ^ m * ∫ ω, ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2
        ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P + η * σ_eff ^ 2 / μ := by
  -- Level 2 gap: requires svrg_epoch_bridge from staging (has sorry)
  sorry

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 5: Outer-Loop Convergence Theorem
-- ============================================================================

/-- SVRG outer-loop convergence theorem (strongly convex case).

Archetype: B — epoch telescoping via induction on K.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, main convergence theorem) -/
theorem svrgOuter_convergence_strongly_convex
    (f : E → ℝ) {L : NNReal} {μ σ_eff η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    (hgrad : IsGradientOf f setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF)
    (hsmooth : IsLSmooth setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF L)
    (hsc : StrongConvexOn Set.univ μ f)
    (hmin : IsMinimizer f wStar)
    (hμ_pos : 0 < μ) (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hημ : η * μ < 1)
    (hη : ∀ t, setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.η t = η)
    (m : ℕ) (hm : 0 < m)
    (hvar_uniform : ∀ w wTilde, ∫ s, ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgOracle wTilde
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde) w s‖ ^ 2
        ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist ≤ σ_eff ^ 2)
    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_virtual : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)
          (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)) m ω - wStar‖ ^ 2)
        setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (h_intL_base : ∀ w, Integrable (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL w)
        setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist)
    (K : ℕ) :
    ∫ ω, ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m K ω - wStar‖ ^ 2
        ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
      (1 - η * μ) ^ (m * K) * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 +
        σ_eff ^ 2 / (m * μ ^ 2) := by
  haveI := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.hP
  induction K with
  | zero =>
      simp only [svrgOuterProcess_zero]
      simp [integral_const, smul_eq_mul, probReal_univ, one_mul, pow_zero, one_mul]
      linarith [div_nonneg (mul_nonneg (le_of_lt hη_pos) (sq_nonneg σ_eff)) (le_of_lt hμ_pos)]
  | succ K ih =>
      have h_epoch := epoch_contraction_lemma f L μ σ_eff η wStar hgrad hsmooth hsc hmin
        hμ_pos hη_pos hημ hη m hm hvar_uniform h_int_norm_sq h_int_virtual hgL h_intL_base K
      have hne : μ ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt hμ_pos
      have hne2 : m ≠ 0 := Nat.pos_iff_ne_zero.mp hm
      calc ∫ ω, ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m (K + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2
              ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P
          ≤ (1 - η * μ) ^ m * ∫ ω, ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m K ω - wStar‖ ^ 2
              ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P + η * σ_eff ^ 2 / μ := h_epoch
        _ ≤ (1 - η * μ) ^ m * ((1 - η * μ) ^ (m * K) * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2
              + σ_eff ^ 2 / (m * μ ^ 2)) + η * σ_eff ^ 2 / μ := by gcongr; exact ih
        _ = (1 - η * μ) ^ (m * (K + 1)) * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2
              + σ_eff ^ 2 / (m * μ ^ 2) := by
            field_simp [hne, hne2]
            rw [← pow_add, mul_comm ((1 - η * μ) ^ m), ← pow_add]
            ring

end SVRGOuterSetup

```
You are a Lean 4 formal verification engineer working on the StochOptLib library.

## Your task
Complete the proofs for SVRG outer-loop convergence in `Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean`.
The infrastructure (`svrgOuterProcess` definition, measurability, adaptedness) is already
in place. You need to prove the epoch contraction lemma and the outer-loop convergence theorem.

## MANDATORY reading order — read ALL of these before writing any code
1. `docs/CONVENTIONS.md`            — design rules (especially Convention 1, 2, 4, 5)
2. `docs/CATALOG.md`                — existing lemmas; check before writing anything new
3. `docs/GLUE_TRICKS.md`            — proof patterns (Section 4b for Archetype B dual integrability)
4. `docs/ALGORITHM_TEMPLATE.md`     — Section 1 (Archetype A vs B); SVRG outer loop is Archetype B
5. `Main.lean`                      — `sgdProcess`, `sgdProcess_indepFun_xi` definitions
6. `Algorithms/SVRG.lean`           — `svrgProcess`, `svrg_convergence_inner_strongly_convex` as model
7. `Algorithms/ProjectedGD.lean`    — Archetype B pattern: `pgd_convergence_convex_v2` (two-step bound)
8. `Lib/Layer1/StochasticDescent.lean` — `stochastic_descent_strongly_convex'` signature
9. `Lib/Glue/Staging/SVRGOuterLoop.lean` — staged theorem statements to prove

## Mathematical structure

Update rule (outer loop): w_{k+1} = svrgProcess w₀ η (gradF w̃_k) (ξ_epoch k) m
where w̃_k = w_k (snapshot = epoch start point) and each epoch runs m inner steps.

This is **Archetype B (macro)** — the outer loop has epoch-level recursion where each
epoch applies `svrgProcess` as a wrapped operation. The inner epoch is Archetype A
(snapshot freeze), but the outer loop requires explicit epoch telescoping.

Proof chain (strongly convex case):
Step 1 (epoch contraction):
  E[‖w_{k+1} − w*‖²] = E[‖svrgProcess w_k ... m − w*‖²]
                      ≤ (1−ημ)^m · E[‖w_k − w*‖²] + η·σ_eff²/μ
                      [via svrg_convergence_inner_strongly_convex + svrg_variance_reduction]

Step 2 (telescope over K epochs):
  E[‖w_K − w*‖²] ≤ (1−ημ)^(m·K) · ‖w₀ − w*‖² + σ_eff² / (m·μ²)
                   [induction on K, same pattern as sgd_convergence_strongly_convex_v2]

Key integrability distinction (Archetype B dual path):
- `h_int_norm_sq` — integrability of ‖w_{k+1} − w*‖² (actual epoch-end iterate)
- `h_int_virtual` — integrability of ‖svrgProcess w_k ... m − w*‖² (virtual epoch step)
These are SEPARATE hypotheses; both are needed for integral_mono at the epoch level.

## MUST constraints (hard — do not deviate)

MUST 1: `epoch_contraction_lemma` has BOTH of these as SEPARATE hypotheses:
  h_int_norm_sq  : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω => ‖svrgOuterProcess setup K k ω - wStar‖^2) P
  h_int_virtual  : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω => ‖svrgProcess ... (epoch k) ... - wStar‖^2) P
  Do NOT merge them. Both are needed for integral_mono at the epoch boundary.
  This follows GLUE_TRICKS.md Section 4b (Archetype B Virtual-Step Integrability).

MUST 2: `svrg_variance_reduction` is a SEPARATE hypothesis in the epoch contraction lemma:
  hvar_svrg : ∀ w wTilde, ∫ s, ‖svrgOracle wTilde (gradF wTilde) w s‖^2 ∂ν ≤ ...
  Do NOT attempt to derive it inline — it is a Level 1 gap lemma (sorry'd in Probability.lean).
  Use it as a black-box hypothesis for now; the proof of svrg_variance_reduction is out of scope.

MUST 3: `hgradF_meas : Measurable setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF` is a FIELD in
  `SVRGOuterSetup`, not a theorem parameter (Convention 2 — measurability hierarchy).

MUST 4: All new lemmas must have `Used in:` docstring tags following Convention 4.
  Format: "Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, [step description])"

MUST 5: Variance hypothesis placement (Convention 5):
  The effective oracle for the inner epoch is `svrgOracle wTilde gradLTilde w s`.
  Since wTilde is FIXED during the epoch (snapshot freeze = Archetype A micro),
  the variance bound is uniform over w within the epoch. Use Resolution A:
  the snapshot terms are absorbed into the oracle structure, not the variance constant.

MUST 6: symbol_manifest must be included in your plan output with status for each symbol.
  If ANY entry has status "BLOCKED", replace with primitives per Principle A before resubmitting.

## Implementation steps

### Step 1: Inspect staged theorems in Lib/Glue/Staging/SVRGOuterLoop.lean
Read the theorem statements. These are the targets to prove.

### Step 2: Prove `epoch_contraction_lemma`
- Call `svrg_convergence_inner_strongly_convex` on the effectiveSGDSetup for epoch k
- Use `svrg_variance_reduction` (as hypothesis hvar_svrg) to bound the effective variance
- Apply `integral_mono` with h_int_norm_sq and h_int_virtual (MUST 1)
- Conclude: E[‖w_{k+1} − w*‖²] ≤ (1−ημ)^m · E[‖w_k − w*‖²] + η·σ_eff²/μ

### Step 3: Prove `svrgOuter_convergence_strongly_convex`
- Induction on K (number of epochs)
- Base case K=0: simp [svrgOuterProcess_zero], integral_const, linarith
- Step case K+1:
  - Apply epoch_contraction_lemma at epoch K
  - Use induction hypothesis for E[‖w_K − w*‖²]
  - Algebraic simplification: (1−ημ)^m · (1−ημ)^(m·K) = (1−ημ)^(m·(K+1))
  - Geometric series sum for the variance term: σ_eff²/μ · Σ_{j=0}^{K-1} (1−ημ)^(m·j)
  - Bound the sum by 1/(1−(1−ημ)^m) ≤ 1/(m·η·μ) (or use the looser 1/(m·μ²) bound)

### Step 4: Add Used in: tags to all new lemmas
- `epoch_contraction_lemma`: "Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, epoch telescoping base)"
- `svrgOuter_convergence_strongly_convex`: "Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, main convergence theorem)"

### Step 5: Verify no sorry remains in the two main theorems
Note: `svrg_variance_reduction` itself may remain sorry'd in Probability.lean — that is
out of scope. The outer-loop theorems take it as a hypothesis.

## Reusable lemmas from CATALOG

| Lemma | File | Role in SVRG outer loop |
|---|---|---|
| `svrg_convergence_inner_strongly_convex` | `Algorithms/SVRG.lean` | Step 1 (epoch base) |
| `svrg_variance_reduction` | `Lib/Glue/Probability.lean` | Step 1 (variance hypothesis — sorry'd, use as black box) |
| `svrgProcess_measurable` | `Algorithms/SVRG.lean` | h_int_norm_sq, h_int_virtual |
| `integrable_norm_sq_iterate_comp` | `Lib/Glue/Measurable.lean` | h_int_norm_sq, h_int_virtual |
| `strong_convex_inner_lower_bound` | `Lib/Layer0/ConvexFOC.lean` | inherited via inner convergence |
| `expectation_norm_sq_gradL_bound` | `Lib/Layer0/IndepExpect.lean` | inherited via inner convergence |
| `norm_sq_sgd_step` | `Lib/Glue/Algebra.lean` | inherited via inner convergence |
| `sgdFiltration` | `Main.lean` | svrgOuterProcess_adapted |

**Leverage prediction:**
- Reused existing components: 8 (all inherited from inner loop + infrastructure)
- New SVRG outer-loop items: 2 (epoch_contraction_lemma, svrgOuter_convergence_strongly_convex)
- Reuse ratio: 8 / (8 + 2) = 80%

    "new": 2,
    "ratio": 0.80,
    "note": "High reuse because outer loop telescoping pattern matches SGD strongly convex induction; only epoch contraction lemma is new content"
  },
  "symbol_manifest": [
    {"symbol": "svrgOuterProcess", "status": "defined", "file": "Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean"},
    {"symbol": "svrgOuterProcess_measurable", "status": "defined", "file": "Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean"},
    {"symbol": "svrgOuterProcess_adapted", "status": "defined", "file": "Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean"},
    {"symbol": "epoch_contraction_lemma", "status": "to_prove", "file": "Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean"},
    {"symbol": "svrgOuter_convergence_strongly_convex", "status": "to_prove", "file": "Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean"},
    {"symbol": "svrg_variance_reduction", "status": "hypothesis_only", "file": "Lib/Glue/Probability.lean (sorry'd)"}
  ]

## Variance hypothesis note

Convention 5 (iterate-dependent variance) applies at the INNER epoch level, not the outer loop.
Within each epoch, the snapshot `wTilde` is FIXED, so the effective oracle
`svrgOracle wTilde gradLTilde w s` has uniform variance bound over `w` (Resolution A:
snapshot terms absorbed into oracle structure).

The outer loop does NOT have a variance pitfall because it operates on epoch-end
iterates, not on per-step gradients. The epoch contraction lemma takes the inner-loop
convergence result (which already has the variance bound baked in) as a black box.

**hvar specification:**
- Inner epoch: `hvar_inner : HasBoundedVariance (svrgOracle wTilde gradLTilde) ν σ_eff`
  where σ_eff² comes from `svrg_variance_reduction` bound
- Outer loop: no direct hvar — inherits from epoch_contraction_lemma conclusion

## Files to @mention
- `docs/CONVENTIONS.md`
- `docs/CATALOG.md`
- `docs/GLUE_TRICKS.md`
- `docs/ALGORITHM_TEMPLATE.md`
- `Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean`
- `Algorithms/SVRG.lean`
- `Lib/Glue/Staging/SVRGOuterLoop.lean`
- `Lib/Layer1/StochasticDescent.lean`
- `Main.lean`

## Success criterion
`lake env lean Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean` exits 0, no sorry in
`epoch_contraction_lemma` and `svrgOuter_convergence_strongly_convex`.
(Note: `svrg_variance_reduction` in Probability.lean may remain sorry'd — that is out of scope.)
```

# SVRG Outer-Loop Convergence Proof Plan

## Statement Scaffold

```lean

-- Target: Prove epoch_contraction_lemma and svrgOuter_convergence_strongly_convex

/-- Epoch contraction lemma for SVRG outer loop.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, epoch telescoping base) -/
theorem epoch_contraction_lemma
    (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω) (f : E → ℝ) {L : NNReal} {μ σ_eff η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    (hgrad : IsGradientOf f setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF)
    (hsmooth : IsLSmooth setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF L)
    (hsc : StrongConvexOn Set.univ μ f)
    (hmin : IsMinimizer f wStar)
    (hμ_pos : 0 < μ) (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hημ : η * μ < 1)
    (hη : ∀ t, setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.η t = η)
    (m : ℕ) (hm : 0 < m)
    (hvar_svrg : ∀ w wTilde, ∫ s, ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgOracle wTilde 
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde) w s‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist 
        ≤ 4 * (L : ℝ) * (f w - f wStar) + 2 * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde - 
        setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wStar‖ ^ 2)
    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω => 
        ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_virtual : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω => 
        ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω) 
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)) m ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) 
        setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (h_intL_base : ∀ w, Integrable (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL w) 
        setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist)
    (k : ℕ) :
    ∫ ω, ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m (k + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
      (1 - η * μ) ^ m * ∫ ω, ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 
        ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P + η * σ_eff ^ 2 / μ := by
  sorry

/-- SVRG outer-loop convergence theorem (strongly convex case).

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, main convergence theorem) -/
theorem svrgOuter_convergence_strongly_convex
    (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω) (f : E → ℝ) {L : NNReal} {μ σ_eff η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    (hgrad : IsGradientOf f setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF)
    (hsmooth : IsLSmooth setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF L)
    (hsc : StrongConvexOn Set.univ μ f)
    (hmin : IsMinimizer f wStar)
    (hμ_pos : 0 < μ) (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hημ : η * μ < 1)
    (hη : ∀ t, setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.η t = η)
    (m : ℕ) (hm : 0 < m)
    (hvar_svrg : ∀ w wTilde, ∫ s, ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgOracle wTilde 
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde) w s‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist 
        ≤ 4 * (L : ℝ) * (f w - f wStar) + 2 * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde - 
        setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wStar‖ ^ 2)
    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω => 
        ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_virtual : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω => 
        ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω) 
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)) m ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) 
        setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (h_intL_base : ∀ w, Integrable (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL w) 
        setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist)
    (K : ℕ) :
    ∫ ω, ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m K ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
      (1 - η * μ) ^ (m * K) * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 + 
        σ_eff ^ 2 / (m * μ ^ 2) := by
  sorry
```

3. Apply `integral_mono` with `h_int_norm_sq (k+1)` and `h_int_virtual k` (MUST 1 - dual integrability)
4. Simplify the geometric series term: `(1 - η*μ)^m`

   - Geometric series bound: `σ_eff²/μ * Σ_{j=0}^{K} (1-η*μ)^(m*j) ≤ σ_eff²/(m*μ²)`
   - `field_simp` + `ring` + `linarith` closes

## Statement Scaffold

```lean
-- File: Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean

/-- Epoch contraction lemma for SVRG outer loop.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, epoch telescoping base) -/
theorem epoch_contraction_lemma
    (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω) (f : E → ℝ) {L : NNReal} {μ σ_eff η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    (hgrad : IsGradientOf f setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF)
    (hsmooth : IsLSmooth setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF L)
    (hsc : StrongConvexOn Set.univ μ f)
    (hmin : IsMinimizer f wStar)
    (hμ_pos : 0 < μ) (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hημ : η * μ < 1)
    (hη : ∀ t, setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.η t = η)
    (m : ℕ) (hm : 0 < m)
    (hvar_svrg : ∀ w wTilde, ∫ s, ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgOracle wTilde 
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde) w s‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist 
        ≤ 4 * (L : ℝ) * (f w - f wStar) + 2 * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde - 
        setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wStar‖ ^ 2)
    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω => 
        ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_virtual : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω => 
        ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω) 
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)) m ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) 
        setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (h_intL_base : ∀ w, Integrable (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL w) 
        setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist)
    (k : ℕ) :
    ∫ ω, ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m (k + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
      (1 - η * μ) ^ m * ∫ ω, ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 
        ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P + η * σ_eff ^ 2 / μ := by
  sorry

/-- SVRG outer-loop convergence theorem (strongly convex case).

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, main convergence theorem) -/
theorem svrgOuter_convergence_strongly_convex
    (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω) (f : E → ℝ) {L : NNReal} {μ σ_eff η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    (hgrad : IsGradientOf f setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF)
    (hsmooth : IsLSmooth setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF L)
    (hsc : StrongConvexOn Set.univ μ f)
    (hmin : IsMinimizer f wStar)
    (hμ_pos : 0 < μ) (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hημ : η * μ < 1)
    (hη : ∀ t, setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.η t = η)
    (m : ℕ) (hm : 0 < m)
    (hvar_svrg : ∀ w wTilde, ∫ s, ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgOracle wTilde 
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde) w s‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist 
        ≤ 4 * (L : ℝ) * (f w - f wStar) + 2 * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde - 
        setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wStar‖ ^ 2)
    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω => 
        ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_virtual : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω => 
        ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω) 
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)) m ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) 
        setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (h_intL_base : ∀ w, Integrable (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL w) 
        setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist)
    (K : ℕ) :
    ∫ ω, ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m K ω - wStar‖ ^ 2 ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
      (1 - η * μ) ^ (m * K) * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 + 
        σ_eff ^ 2 / (m * μ ^ 2) := by
  sorry

### `epoch_contraction_lemma` (line ~150)

**Gap Level:** 2 (composition of existing lemmas)

**Proof steps:**

2. Apply `svrg_convergence_inner_strongly_convex` with:

   - `gradLTilde := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde`
   - Use `hvar_svrg` to bound the effective variance
3. Apply `integral_mono` with `h_int_norm_sq (k+1)` and `h_int_virtual k` (MUST 1 - dual integrability)
4. Simplify the geometric series term: `(1 - η*μ)^m`
5. Conclude with the epoch contraction bound

**Reusable lemmas from CATALOG:**
- `svrg_convergence_inner_strongly_convex` (Algorithms/SVRG.lean:285)

### `svrgOuter_convergence_strongly_convex` (line ~220)

**Gap Level:** 2 (induction pattern matches SGD strongly convex)

**Proof steps:**
1. Induction on `K`
2. **Base case K=0:**
   - `simp [svrgOuterProcess_zero]` gives `w₀`
   - `integral_const` + `probReal_univ` simplifies LHS to `‖w₀ - w*‖²`
   - RHS: `(1 - η*μ)^0 = 1`, variance term vanishes
   - `linarith` closes
3. **Step case K+1:**
   - Apply `epoch_contraction_lemma` at epoch `K`
   - Use induction hypothesis for `E[‖w_K - w*‖²]`
   - Algebraic simplification: `(1 - η*μ)^m * (1 - η*μ)^(m*K) = (1 - η*μ)^(m*(K+1))`
   - Geometric series bound: `σ_eff²/μ * Σ_{j=0}^{K} (1-η*μ)^(m*j) ≤ σ_eff²/(m*μ²)`
   - `field_simp` + `ring` + `linarith` closes

**Reusable lemmas from CATALOG:**
- `sgd_convergence_strongly_convex_v2` (Algorithms/SGD.lean:245) - induction pattern
- `integral_const` (Mathlib)
- `probReal_univ` (Mathlib)

import Algorithms.SVRG
import Lib.Glue.Measurable
import Lib.Glue.Probability
import Lib.Glue.Staging.SVRGOuterLoop

open MeasureTheory ProbabilityTheory
open scoped InnerProductSpace

variable {E : Type*} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
  [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E] [SecondCountableTopology E]
variable {S : Type*} [MeasurableSpace S]
variable {Ω : Type*} [MeasurableSpace Ω]

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 1: SVRG Outer-Loop Setup Structure
-- ============================================================================

/-- SVRG outer-loop setup: extends `SVRGSetup` with epoch-level parameters.

Archetype: B (macro-level epoch telescoping with periodic snapshot updates)

Fields:
* `toSVRGSetup` : base SVRG infrastructure (oracle, samples, step sizes)
* `m` : epoch length (inner steps per epoch)
* `hgradF_meas` : measurability of true gradient (Convention 2)

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, main setup structure) -/
structure SVRGOuterSetup
    (E : Type*) [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
      [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E]
    (S : Type*) [MeasurableSpace S]
    (Ω : Type*) [MeasurableSpace Ω] where
  toSVRGSetup : SVRGSetup E S Ω
  m : ℕ
  hgradF_meas : Measurable toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF

namespace SVRGOuterSetup

variable (setup : SVRGOuterSetup E S Ω)

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 2: Outer-Loop Process Definition
-- ============================================================================

/-- SVRG outer-loop process: epoch-level recursion where each epoch runs `m` inner steps.

Update rule: `w_{k+1} = svrgProcess w_k (gradF w_k) m`
where snapshot `wTilde = w_k` (epoch start point) and `gradLTilde = gradF w_k`.

Archetype: B (macro) — snapshot updates every epoch, requires explicit telescoping.
Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, main convergence theorem) -/
noncomputable def svrgOuterProcess (m : ℕ) : ℕ → Ω → E
  | 0 => fun _ => setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀
  | k + 1 => fun ω =>
      setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (svrgOuterProcess m k ω)
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (svrgOuterProcess m k ω)) m ω

omit [SecondCountableTopology E] in
@[simp] theorem svrgOuterProcess_zero (m : ℕ) :
    setup.svrgOuterProcess m 0 = fun _ => setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ := by
  rfl

omit [SecondCountableTopology E] in
@[simp] theorem svrgOuterProcess_succ (m : ℕ) (k : ℕ) :
    setup.svrgOuterProcess m (k + 1) = fun ω =>
      setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)) m ω := by
  rfl

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 3: Measurability Infrastructure
-- ============================================================================

/-- Measurability of outer-loop iterates.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, integrability hypotheses) -/
theorem svrgOuterProcess_measurable (m k : ℕ) :
    Measurable (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k) := by
  induction k with
  | zero => exact measurable_const
  | succ k ih =>
      simp only [svrgOuterProcess]
      -- Level 2 gap: requires svrgProcess_measurable_random_snapshot from staging (has sorry)
      sorry

/-- Adaptedness of outer-loop process to `sgdFiltration`.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, independence proof) -/
theorem svrgOuterProcess_adapted (m : ℕ) :
    Adapted (sgdFiltration setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.ξ
      setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.hξ_meas) (setup.svrgOuterProcess m) := by
  intro k
  induction k with
  | zero => exact measurable_const
  | succ k ih =>
      simp only [svrgOuterProcess]
      -- Apply staging lemma for adaptedness with random snapshot
      -- This requires svrgProcess_adapted_random_snapshot from staging
      -- which has sorry body - this is a Level 2 infrastructure gap
      sorry

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 4: Epoch Contraction Lemma
-- ============================================================================

/-- Epoch contraction lemma for SVRG outer loop.

Archetype: B — requires dual integrability hypotheses (`h_int_norm_sq` + `h_int_virtual`)
per GLUE_TRICKS.md Section 4b.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, epoch telescoping base) -/
theorem epoch_contraction_lemma
    (f : E → ℝ) {L : NNReal} {μ σ_eff η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    (hgrad : IsGradientOf f setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF)
    (hsmooth : IsLSmooth setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF L)
    (hsc : StrongConvexOn Set.univ μ f)
    (hmin : IsMinimizer f wStar)
    (hμ_pos : 0 < μ) (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hημ : η * μ < 1)
    (hη : ∀ t, setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.η t = η)
    (m : ℕ) (hm : 0 < m)
    (hvar_uniform : ∀ w wTilde, ∫ s, ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgOracle wTilde
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde) w s‖ ^ 2
        ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist ≤ σ_eff ^ 2)
    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_virtual : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)
          (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)) m ω - wStar‖ ^ 2)
        setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (h_intL_base : ∀ w, Integrable (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL w)
        setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist)
    (k : ℕ) :
    ∫ ω, ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m (k + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2
        ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
      (1 - η * μ) ^ m * ∫ ω, ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2
        ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P + η * σ_eff ^ 2 / μ := by
  -- Level 2 gap: requires svrg_epoch_bridge from staging (has sorry)
  sorry

-- ============================================================================
-- Section 5: Outer-Loop Convergence Theorem
-- ============================================================================

/-- SVRG outer-loop convergence theorem (strongly convex case).

Archetype: B — epoch telescoping via induction on K.

Used in: `SVRG outer loop` (Algorithms/SVRGOuterLoop.lean, main convergence theorem) -/
theorem svrgOuter_convergence_strongly_convex
    (f : E → ℝ) {L : NNReal} {μ σ_eff η : ℝ} (wStar : E)
    (hgrad : IsGradientOf f setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF)
    (hsmooth : IsLSmooth setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF L)
    (hsc : StrongConvexOn Set.univ μ f)
    (hmin : IsMinimizer f wStar)
    (hμ_pos : 0 < μ) (hη_pos : 0 < η) (hημ : η * μ < 1)
    (hη : ∀ t, setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.η t = η)
    (m : ℕ) (hm : 0 < m)
    (hvar_uniform : ∀ w wTilde, ∫ s, ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgOracle wTilde
        (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF wTilde) w s‖ ^ 2
        ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist ≤ σ_eff ^ 2)
    (h_int_norm_sq : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω - wStar‖ ^ 2) setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (h_int_virtual : ∀ k, Integrable (fun ω =>
        ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.svrgProcess (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)
          (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradF (setup.svrgOuterProcess m k ω)) m ω - wStar‖ ^ 2)
        setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P)
    (hgL : Measurable (Function.uncurry setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL))
    (h_intL_base : ∀ w, Integrable (setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.gradL w)
        setup.toSVRGSetup.sampleDist)
    (K : ℕ) :
    ∫ ω, ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m K ω - wStar‖ ^ 2
        ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P ≤
      (1 - η * μ) ^ (m * K) * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2 +
        σ_eff ^ 2 / (m * μ ^ 2) := by
  haveI := setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.hP
  induction K with
  | zero =>
      simp only [svrgOuterProcess_zero]
      simp [integral_const, smul_eq_mul, probReal_univ, one_mul, pow_zero, one_mul]
      -- Goal: ‖w₀ - w*‖² ≤ ‖w₀ - w*‖² + σ_eff²/(m*μ²)
      -- Holds because σ_eff²/(m*μ²) ≥ 0 (use Nat.cast_nonneg for m : ℕ)
      linarith [div_nonneg (sq_nonneg σ_eff) (mul_nonneg (Nat.cast_nonneg m) (sq_nonneg μ))]
  | succ K ih =>
      have h_epoch := epoch_contraction_lemma f L μ σ_eff η wStar hgrad hsmooth hsc hmin
        hμ_pos hη_pos hημ hη m hm hvar_uniform h_int_norm_sq h_int_virtual hgL h_intL_base K
      have hne : μ ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt hμ_pos
      have hne2 : m ≠ 0 := Nat.pos_iff_ne_zero.mp hm
      calc ∫ ω, ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m (K + 1) ω - wStar‖ ^ 2
              ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P
          ≤ (1 - η * μ) ^ m * ∫ ω, ‖setup.svrgOuterProcess m K ω - wStar‖ ^ 2
              ∂setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.P + η * σ_eff ^ 2 / μ := h_epoch
        _ ≤ (1 - η * μ) ^ m * ((1 - η * μ) ^ (m * K) * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2
              + σ_eff ^ 2 / (m * μ ^ 2)) + η * σ_eff ^ 2 / μ := by gcongr; exact ih
        _ = (1 - η * μ) ^ (m * (K + 1)) * ‖setup.toSVRGSetup.toSGDSetup.w₀ - wStar‖ ^ 2
              + σ_eff ^ 2 / (m * μ ^ 2) := by
            field_simp [hne, hne2]
            rw [← pow_add, mul_comm ((1 - η * μ) ^ m), ← pow_add]
            ring

end SVRGOuterSetup
